explanation: A person who has totally detached himself from sense objects that give temporary pleasure and enjoyment, he who has learned to control and equalize the number of breaths going outwards and inwards through the nostrils, he who has brought his senses, mind and intellect under full control, and he who is desire less fearless and without anger, is always a free and liberated wise man.

sanskrit: भोक्तारं यज्ञतपसां सर्वलोकमहेश्वरम् । सुहृदं सर्वभूतानां ज्ञात्वा मां शान्तिमृच्छति ॥ ५.२९ ॥
hindi: मेरा भक्त मुझको सब यज्ञ और तपोंका भोगनेवाला, सम्पूर्ण लोकोंके ईश्वरोंका भी ईश्वर तथा सम्पूर्ण भूत-प्राणियोंका सुहृद् अर्थात् स्वार्थरहित दयालु और प्रेमी, ऐसा तत्त्वसे जानकर शान्तिको प्राप्त होता है|
english: The Lord declared:O Arjuna, he who shall consider ME the enjoyer of sacrifices and all that is internally pure, and who is devoted to ME, the God of all worlds and well-wisher of all beings, attains true, everlasting peace.
explanation: The Lord declared:O Arjuna, he who shall consider ME the enjoyer of sacrifices and all that is internally pure, and who is devoted to ME, the God of all worlds and well-wisher of all beings, attains true, everlasting peace.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अनाश्रितः कर्मफलं कार्यं कर्म करोति यः स संन्यासी च योगी च न निरग्निर्न चाक्रियः ॥...
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले—जो पुरुष कर्मफलका आश्रय न लेकर करनेयोग्य कर्म करता है, वह संन्यासी तथा योगी है और केवल अग्निका त्याग करनेवाला संन्यासी नहीं है तथा केवल क्रियाओंका त्याग करनेवाला योगी नहीं है|
english: Lord Krishna continued: A Sannyaasi is one who performs action or duty (Karma) without desiring any reward or other results for his actions. One cannot be a Sannyaasi or a Yogi by simply not petorming Karma.
explanation: Lord Krishna continued: A Sannyaasi is one who performs action or duty (Karma) without desiring any reward or other results for his actions. One cannot be a Sannyaasi or a Yogi by simply not petorming Karma.

sanskrit: यं संन्यासमिति प्राहुर्योगं तं विद्धि पाण्डव । न ह्यसंन्यस्तसंकल्पो योगी भवति कश्चन ॥ ६.२ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! जिसको संन्यास’ ऐसा कहते हैं, उसीको तू योग’ जान; क्योंकि संकल्पोंका त्याग न करनेवाला कोई भी पुरुष योगी नहीं होता|
english: O Arjuna, consider Sannyaas and Yoga as one and the same; just as one becomes a Sannyassi by giving up all desires, similarly to be a Yogi one must do the same.
explanation: O Arjuna, consider Sannyaas and Yoga as one and the same; just as one becomes a Sannyassi by giving up all desires, similarly to be a Yogi one must do the same.

sanskrit: आरुरुक्षोर्मुनेर्योगं कर्म कारणमुच्यते । योगारूढस्य तस्यैव शमः कारणमुच्यते ॥ ६.३ ॥
hindi: योगमें आरूढ़ होनेकी इच्छावाले मननशील पुरुषके लिये योगकी प्राप्तिमें निष्कामभावसे कर्म करना ही हेतु कहा जाता है और योगारूढ़ हो जानेपर उस योगारूढ़ पुरुषका जो सर्वसंकल्पोंका अभाव है, वही कल्याणमें हेतु कहा जाता है|
english: For one who wishes to establish himself in the divinity of Yoga. O Arjuna, he must follow the method of doing Karma without desires of any sort. For, giving up all worldly thoughts is the path that will lead you to being fully and truly established in Yoga, Dear Arjuna.
explanation: For one who wishes to establish himself in the divinity of Yoga. O Arjuna, he must follow the method of doing Karma without desires of any sort. For, giving up all worldly thoughts is the path that will lead you to being fully and truly established in Yoga, Dear Arjuna.

sanskrit: यदा हि नेन्द्रियार्थेषु न कर्मस्वनुषज्जते । सर्वसंकल्पसंन्यासी योगारूढस्तदोच्यते ॥ ६.४ ॥
hindi: जिस कालमें न तो इन्द्रियोंके भोगोंमें और न कर्मोंमें ही आसक्त होता है, उस कालमें सर्वसंकल्पोंका त्यागी पुरुष योगारूढ़ कहा जाता है|
english: When one is no longer attached to sensual objects or to the Karma that he does, and when he has totally rid himself of all desires, at that time, a person is considered to be fully and undoubtedly established in Yoga.
explanation: When one is no longer attached to sensual objects or to the Karma that he does, and when he has totally rid himself of all desires, at that time, a person is considered to be fully and undoubtedly established in Yoga.

sanskrit: उद्धरेदात्मनात्मानं नात्मानमवसादयेत् । आत्मैव ह्यात्मनो बन्धुरात्मैव रिपुरात्मनः ॥ ६.५ ॥
hindi: अपने द्वारा अपना संसार- समुद्रसे उद्धार करे और अपनेको अधोगतिमें न डाले; क्योंकि यह मनुष्य आप ही तो अपना मित्र है और आप ही अपना शत्रु है|
english: Dear Arjuna, one should lift himself through his own efforts. He success or failure in performing his Karma should be the result of his own doing. Should a man fail, he should not degrade himself, O Arjuna, for he is his own true friend as well as his own true enemy.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, one should lift himself through his own efforts. He success or failure in performing his Karma should be the result of his own doing. Should a man fail, he should not degrade himself, O Arjuna, for he is his own true friend as well as his own true enemy.

sanskrit: बन्धुरात्मात्मनस्तस्य येनात्मैवात्मना जितः । अनात्मनस्तु शत्रुत्वे वर्तेतात्मैव शत्रुवत् ॥ ६.६ ॥
hindi: जिस जीवात्माद्वारा मन और इन्द्रियोंसहित शरीर जीता हुआ है, उस जीवात्माका तो वह आप ही मित्र है और जिसके द्वारा मन तथा इन्द्रियोंसहित शरीर नहीं जीता गया है, उसके लिये वह आप ही शत्रुके सदृश शत्रुतामें बर्तता है|
english: The true self (soul) is only its own friend if it is free from attachment and in control of its own mind, body and senses. However, dear Arjuna, if one’s soul is not in control of mind body and senses, then the soul is its own enemy.
explanation: The true self (soul) is only its own friend if it is free from attachment and in control of its own mind, body and senses. However, dear Arjuna, if one’s soul is not in control of mind body and senses, then the soul is its own enemy.

sanskrit: जितात्मनः प्रशान्तस्य परमात्मा समाहितः । शीतोष्णसुखदुःखेषु तथा मानापमानयोः ॥ ६.७ ॥
hindi: सरदी गरमी और सुख दुःखादिमें तथा मान – – और अपमानमें जिसके अन्तःकरणकी वृत्तियाँ भलीभाँति शान्त हैं, ऐसे स्वाधीन आत्मावाले पुरुष ज्ञानमें सच्चिदानन्दघन परमात्मा सम्यक् स्थित है अर्थात् उसके ज्ञानमें परमात्माके सिवा अन्य कुछ है ही नहीं|
english: One who has truly achieved peace with the self and a balance in cold and heat, joy and sorrow, respect and disrespect, has a purified and liberated soul, God dwells in souls such as these and the soul thereby, becomes truly divine.
explanation: One who has truly achieved peace with the self and a balance in cold and heat, joy and sorrow, respect and disrespect, has a purified and liberated soul, God dwells in souls such as these and the soul thereby, becomes truly divine.

sanskrit: ज्ञानविज्ञानतृप्तात्मा कूटस्थो विजितेन्द्रियः । युक्त इत्युच्यते योगी समलोष्टाश्मकाञ्चनः ॥ ६.८ ॥
hindi: जिसका अन्तःकरण ज्ञान विज्ञानसे तृप्त है, – जिसकी स्थिति विकाररहित है, जिसकी इन्द्रियाँ भलीभाँति जीती हुई हैं और जिसके लिये मिट्टी, पत्थर और सुवर्ण समान हैं, वह योगी युक्त अर्थात् भगवत्प्राप्त है, ऐसे कहा जाता है|
english: he Lord explained: When one’s mind is at peace and fully contented with the Gyan (Knowledge or wisdom) it has acquired, one whose mind is constantly stable and fixed in God, who has controlled his senses well and considers dirt, stone and gold as one, is said to have achieved unity with God. He is the perfect Yogi, O Arjuna.
explanation: he Lord explained: When one’s mind is at peace and fully contented with the Gyan (Knowledge or wisdom) it has acquired, one whose mind is constantly stable and fixed in God, who has controlled his senses well and considers dirt, stone and gold as one, is said to have achieved unity with God. He is the perfect Yogi, O Arjuna.

sanskrit: सुहृन्मित्रार्युदासीनमध्यस्थद्वेष्यबन्धुषु । साधुष्वपि च पापेषु समबुद्धिर्विशिष्यते ॥ ६.९ ॥
hindi: सुहृद्’, मित्र, वैरी, उदासीन, मध्यस्थ , द्वेष्य और बन्धुगणोंमें, धर्मात्माओंमें और पापियोंमें भी समानभाव रखनेवाला अत्यन्त श्रेष्ठ है|
english: One who thinks about and behaves with dear ones, friends, enemies, neutral ones, mediators malicious people, relatives, saints and sinful people, in the same manner, is truly a superior person.
explanation: One who thinks about and behaves with dear ones, friends, enemies, neutral ones, mediators malicious people, relatives, saints and sinful people, in the same manner, is truly a superior person.

sanskrit: शुचौ देशे प्रतिष्ठाप्य स्थिरमासनमात्मनः । नात्युच्छ्रितं नातिनीचं चैलाजिनकुशोत्तरम् ॥ ६.११ ॥
hindi: शुद्ध भूमिमें, जिसके ऊपर क्रमश: कुशा, मृगछाला और वस्त्र बिछे हैं, जो न बहुत ऊँचा है और न बहुत नीचा, ऐसे अपने आसनको स्थिर स्थापन करके
english: For proper meditation, the Yogi should seek a clear spot, covered with grass, deer skin and/or clothing, which is neither very high nor very low, to seat himself.
explanation: For proper meditation, the Yogi should seek a clear spot, covered with grass, deer skin and/or clothing, which is neither very high nor very low, to seat himself.

sanskrit: तत्रैकाग्रं मनः कृत्वा यतचित्तेन्द्रियक्रियः । उपविश्यासने युञ्ज्याद्योगमात्मविशुद्धये ॥ ६.१२ ॥
hindi: उस आसनपर बैठकर चित्त और इन्द्रियोंकी क्रियाओंको वशमें रखते हुए मनको ए करके अन्तःकरणकी शुद्धिके लिये योगका अभ्यास करे|
english: He should then practice Yoga for the purpose of purifying his mind and soul, focusing his thoughts on one point (God) at all times, and fully controlling the function of mind and senses.
explanation: He should then practice Yoga for the purpose of purifying his mind and soul, focusing his thoughts on one point (God) at all times, and fully controlling the function of mind and senses.

sanskrit: समं कायशिरोग्रीवं धारयन्नचलं स्थिरः । सम्प्रेक्ष्य नासिकाग्रं स्वं दिशश्चानवलोकयन् ॥ ६.१३ ॥
hindi: काया, सिर और गलेको समान एवं अचल धारण करके और स्थिर होकर, अपनी नासिका अग्रभागपर दृष्टि जमाकर, अन्य दिशाओंको न देखता हुआ|
english: The Lord instructed Arjuna:While meditating one must keep the head, neck and torso (upper body) as straight and as steady as possible, without even a slight movement.firmly looking at the tip of the nose and looking in no other direction whatsoever.
explanation: The Lord instructed Arjuna:While meditating one must keep the head, neck and torso (upper body) as straight and as steady as possible, without even a slight movement.firmly looking at the tip of the nose and looking in no other direction whatsoever.

sanskrit: प्रशान्तात्मा विगतभीर्ब्रह्मचारिव्रते स्थितः । मनः संयम्य मच्चित्तो युक्त आसीत मत्परः ॥ ६.१४ ॥
hindi: ब्रह्मचारीके व्रतमें स्थित, भयरहित तथा भलीभाँति शान्त अन्तःकरणवाला सावधान योगी मनको रोककर मुझमें चित्तवाला और मेरे परायण होकर स्थित होवे|
english: It is said the fruit of actions performed in the mode of goodness bestow pure results. Actions done in the mode of passion result in pain, while those performed in the mode of ignorance result in darkness.
explanation: It is said the fruit of actions performed in the mode of goodness bestow pure results. Actions done in the mode of passion result in pain, while those performed in the mode of ignorance result in darkness.

sanskrit: युञ्जन्नेवं सदात्मानं योगी नियतमानसः । शान्तिं निर्वाणपरमां मत्संस्थामधिगच्छति ॥ ६.१५ ॥
hindi: वशमें किये हुए मनवाला योगी इस प्रकार आत्माको निरन्तर मुझ परमेश्वरके स्वरूपमें लगाता हुआ मुझमें रहनेवाली परमानन्दकी पराकाष्ठारूप शान्तिको प्राप्त होता है|
english: In this way, the true, self-controlled Yogi. Will inevitably attain eternal peace and be in the highest state of bliss by fixing his mind on Me during (proper) meditation.
explanation: In this way, the true, self-controlled Yogi. Will inevitably attain eternal peace and be in the highest state of bliss by fixing his mind on Me during (proper) meditation.

sanskrit: नात्यश्नतस्तु योगोऽस्ति न चैकान्तमनश्नतः । न चाति स्वप्नशीलस्य जाग्रतो नैव चार्जुन ॥ ६.१६ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन! यह योग न तो बहुत खानेवालेका, न बिलकुल न खानेवालेका, न बहुत शयन करनेके स्वभाववालेका और न सदा जागनेवालेका ही सिद्ध होता है|
english: There must be a constant balance in everything a Yogi does. Eating too much or eating very little, sleeping too much or sleeping very little, for example, are not methods of succeeding in this Yoga.
explanation: There must be a constant balance in everything a Yogi does. Eating too much or eating very little, sleeping too much or sleeping very little, for example, are not methods of succeeding in this Yoga.

sanskrit: युक्ताहारविहारस्य युक्तचेष्टस्य कर्मसु । युक्तस्वप्नावबोधस्य योगो भवति दुःखहा ॥ ६.१७ ॥
hindi: दुःखोंका नाश करनेवाला योग तो यथायोग्य आहार विहार करनेवालेका, कर्मोंमें यथायोग्य चेष्टा – करनेवालेका और यथायोग्य सोने तथा जागनेवालेका ही सिद्ध होता है|
english: O Arjuna, only those people who eat, live, work and sleep moderately, and destroy all misery, succeed in this Yoga.
explanation: O Arjuna, only those people who eat, live, work and sleep moderately, and destroy all misery, succeed in this Yoga.

sanskrit: यदा विनियतं चित्तमात्मन्येवावतिष्ठते । निःस्पृहः सर्वकामेभ्यो युक्त इत्युच्यते तदा ॥ ६.१८ ॥
hindi: अत्यन्त वशमें किया हुआ चित्त जिस कालमें परमात्मामें ही भलीभाँति स्थित हो जाता है, उस कालमें सम्पूर्ण भोगोंसे स्पृहारहित पुरुष योगयुक्त है, ऐसा कहा जाता है|
english: When one has freed himself of all desires, he will then always be firmly established in Yoga. When one has full control of his mind, he will be fully established in God.
explanation: When one has freed himself of all desires, he will then always be firmly established in Yoga. When one has full control of his mind, he will be fully established in God.

sanskrit: यथा दीपो निवातस्थो नेङ्गते सोपमा स्मृता । योगिनो यतचित्तस्य युञ्जतो योगमात्मनः ॥ ६.१९ ॥
hindi: जिस प्रकार वायुरहित स्थानमें स्थित दीपक चलाय मान नहीं होता, वैसी ही उपमा परमात्माके ध्यानमें लगे हुए योगीके जीते हुए चित्तकी कही गयी है|
english: The Almighty explained: Just as the flame of a lamp does not flicker in a place without wind, in the same way the controlled mind of the Yogi does not get distracted by worldly objects or pleasures.
explanation: The Almighty explained: Just as the flame of a lamp does not flicker in a place without wind, in the same way the controlled mind of the Yogi does not get distracted by worldly objects or pleasures.

sanskrit: सुखमात्यन्तिकं यत्तद् बुद्धिग्राह्यमतीन्द्रियम् । वेत्ति यत्र न चैवायं स्थितश्चलति तत्त्वतः ॥ ६.२१ ...
hindi: इन्द्रियोंसे अतीत, केवल शुद्ध हुई सूक्ष्म बुद्धिद्वारा ग्रहण करनेयोग्य जो अनन्त आनन्द है; उसको जिस अवस्था में अनुभव करता है और जिस अवस्थामें स्थित यह योगी परमात्माके स्वरूपसे विचलित होता ही नहीं |
english: O Arjuna, the limitless and everlasting joy and bliss that a true Yogi feels cannot be perceived by the ordinary senses, but can only be felt by a person who has a subtle, keen and clever intellect. When this Yogi has discovered this true happiness, he will never stray or move away from the Truth, Arjuna.
explanation: O Arjuna, the limitless and everlasting joy and bliss that a true Yogi feels cannot be perceived by the ordinary senses, but can only be felt by a person who has a subtle, keen and clever intellect. When this Yogi has discovered this true happiness, he will never stray or move away from the Truth, Arjuna.

sanskrit: यं लब्ध्वा चापरं लाभं मन्यते नाधिकं ततः । यस्मिन्स्थितो न दुःखेन गुरुणापि विचाल्यते ॥ ६.२२ ॥
hindi: परमात्माकी प्राप्तिरूप जिस लाभको प्राप्त होकर उससे अधिक दूसरा कुछ भी लाभ नहीं मानता और परमात्मप्राप्तिरूप जिस अवस्थामें स्थित योगी बड़े भारी दुःखसे भी चलायमान नहीं होता|
english: Having achieved this divine state of bliss, Dear Arjuna, the Yogi realizes that no other state or condition could be greater, thus even the most intense pains will never lead the Yogi astray from Truth or devotion to Me, the Supreme Soul.
explanation: Having achieved this divine state of bliss, Dear Arjuna, the Yogi realizes that no other state or condition could be greater, thus even the most intense pains will never lead the Yogi astray from Truth or devotion to Me, the Supreme Soul.

sanskrit: तं विद्याद्\u200cदुःखसंयोगवियोगं योगसंज्ञितम् ॥ ६.२३ ॥
hindi: जो दुःखरूप संसारके संयोगसे रहित है तथा जिसका नाम योग है; उसको जानना चाहिये । वह योग न उकताये हुए अर्थात् धैर्य और उत्साहयुक्त चित्तसे निश्चयपूर्वक करना कर्तव्य है|
english: Yoga is the means to liberate (free) one from all miseries of the world. Yoga should always be practical with a fixed mind and determination.
explanation: Yoga is the means to liberate (free) one from all miseries of the world. Yoga should always be practical with a fixed mind and determination.

sanskrit: स निश्चयेन योक्तव्यो योगोऽनिर्विण्णचेतसा । संकल्पप्रभवान्कामांस्त्यक्त्वा सर्वानशेषतः मनसैवेन्द्रि...
hindi: संकल्पसे उत्पन्न होनेवाली सम्पूर्ण कामनाओंको नि: शेषरूपसे त्यागकर और मनके द्वारा इन्द्रियोंके समुदायको सभी ओरसे भलीभाँति रोककर
english: Once one has completely given up all desires created from his imagination and once one has learned to mentally control all of his senses, one slowly and gradually becomes peaceful. A true Yogi with a steady intellect fixes his mind only on God and thinks of nothing else but the Lord.
explanation: Once one has completely given up all desires created from his imagination and once one has learned to mentally control all of his senses, one slowly and gradually becomes peaceful. A true Yogi with a steady intellect fixes his mind only on God and thinks of nothing else but the Lord.

sanskrit: शनैः शनैरुपरमेद्\u200cबुद्ध्या धृतिगृहीतया । आत्मसंस्थं मनः कृत्वा न किंचिदपि चिन्तयेत् ॥ ६.२५ ॥
hindi: क्रम-क्रमसे अभ्यास करता हुआ उपरतिको प्राप्त हो तथा धैर्ययुक्त बुद्धिके द्वारा मनको परमात्मामें स्थित करके परमात्माके सिवा और कुछ भी चिन्तन न करे|
english: Once one has completely given up all desires created from his imagination and once one has learned to mentally control all of his senses, one slowly and gradually becomes peaceful. A true Yogi with a steady intellect fixes his mind only on God and thinks of nothing else but the Lord.
explanation: Once one has completely given up all desires created from his imagination and once one has learned to mentally control all of his senses, one slowly and gradually becomes peaceful. A true Yogi with a steady intellect fixes his mind only on God and thinks of nothing else but the Lord.

sanskrit: यतो यतो निश्चरति मनश्चञ्चलमस्थिरम् । ततस्ततो नियम्यैतदात्मन्येव वशं नयेत् ॥ ६.२६ ॥
hindi: यह स्थिर न रहनेवाला और चञ्चल मन जिस जिस शब्दादि विषयके निमित्तसे संसारमें विचरता है, उस उस विषयसे रोककर यानी हटाकर इसे बार बार परमात्मामें ही निरुद्ध करे|
english: The unsteady, wandering and constantly distracted mind should always be controlled and fixed in God.
explanation: The unsteady, wandering and constantly distracted mind should always be controlled and fixed in God.

sanskrit: प्रशान्तमनसं ह्येनं योगिनं सुखमुत्तमम् । उपैति शान्तरजसं ब्रह्मभूतमकल्मषम् ॥ ६.२७ ॥
hindi: क्योंकि जिसका मन भली प्रकार शान्त है, जो पापसे रहित है और जिसका रजोगुण शान्त हो गया है, ऐसे इस सच्चिदानन्दघन ब्रह्मके साथ एकीभाव हुए योगीको उत्तम आनन्द प्राप्त होता है |
english: Lord Krishna explained:The true Yogi has a peaceful mind, is free from sin and all evils of the world, becomes and eternal bliss.
explanation: Lord Krishna explained:The true Yogi has a peaceful mind, is free from sin and all evils of the world, becomes and eternal bliss.

sanskrit: युञ्जन्नेवं सदात्मानं योगी विगतकल्मषः । सुखेन ब्रह्मसंस्पर्शमत्यन्तं सुखमश्नुते ॥ ६.२८ ॥
hindi: वह पापरहित योगी इस प्रकार निरन्तर आत्माको परमात्मामें लगाता हुआ सुखपूर्वक परब्रह्म परमात्माकी प्राप्तिरूप अनन्त आनन्दका अनुभव करता है|
english: The sinless Yogi is constantly engaged in Yoga, and experiences no difficulty in achieving the greatest bliss and happiness of all, O Arjuna. That is, uniting and being one with Me, the Lord.
explanation: The sinless Yogi is constantly engaged in Yoga, and experiences no difficulty in achieving the greatest bliss and happiness of all, O Arjuna. That is, uniting and being one with Me, the Lord.

sanskrit: सर्वभूतस्थमात्मानं सर्वभूतानि चात्मनि । ईक्षते योगयुक्तात्मा सर्वत्र समदर्शनः ॥ ६.२९ ॥
hindi: सर्वव्यापी अनन्त चेतनमें एकीभावसे स्थितिरूप योगसे युक्त आत्मावाला तथा सबमें समभावसे देखनेवाला योगी आत्माको सम्पूर्ण भूतोंमें स्थित और सम्पूर्ण भूतोंको आत्मामें कल्पित देखता है|
english: he wiseman who is forever engaged in performing Yoga, never discriminates against anybody because he sees his own self in all beings, and all beings within his own self.
explanation: he wiseman who is forever engaged in performing Yoga, never discriminates against anybody because he sees his own self in all beings, and all beings within his own self.

sanskrit: सर्वभूतस्थितं यो मां भजत्येकत्वमास्थितः । सर्वथा वर्तमानोऽपि स योगी मयि वर्तते ॥ ६.३१ ॥
hindi: जो पुरुष एकीभावमें स्थित होकर सम्पूर्ण भूतोंमें आत्मरूपसे स्थित मुझ सच्चिदानन्दघन वासुदेवको भजता है, वह योगी सब प्रकारसे बरतता हुआ भी मुझमें ही बरतता है|
english: The Lord proclaimed: O Arjuna, I am present in all beings. He who worships me with a steady, peaceful and undistracted mind, is a true Yogi and he dwells within Me in My heart always.
explanation: The Lord proclaimed: O Arjuna, I am present in all beings. He who worships me with a steady, peaceful and undistracted mind, is a true Yogi and he dwells within Me in My heart always.

sanskrit: आत्मौपम्येन सर्वत्र समं पश्यति योऽर्जुन । सुखं वा यदि वा दुःखं स योगी परमो मतः ॥ ६.३२ ॥
hindi: अर्जुन ! जो योगी अपनी भाँति सम्पूर्ण भूतोंमें सम देखता है और सुख अथवा दुःखको भी सबमें सम देखता है, वह योगी परम श्रेष्ठ माना गया है|
english: Dear Arjuna, the Yogi who looks upon all beings as his own self, treats all beings equally, and considers happiness and misery as the same, is truly a great being himself.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, the Yogi who looks upon all beings as his own self, treats all beings equally, and considers happiness and misery as the same, is truly a great being himself.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । योऽयं योगस्त्वया प्रोक्तः साम्येन मधुसूदन एतस्याहं न पश्यामि चञ्चलत्वात्स्थितिं स्थि...
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—हे मधुसूदन ! जो यह योग आपने समभावसे कहा है, मनके चञ्चल होनेसे मैं इसकी नित्य स्थितिको नहीं देखता हूँ|
english: Arjuna asked Shri Krishna: Dear Lord, I simply cannot regard the Yoga of even-mindedness as a firm and stable exercise because of the instability of the mind itself.
explanation: Arjuna asked Shri Krishna: Dear Lord, I simply cannot regard the Yoga of even-mindedness as a firm and stable exercise because of the instability of the mind itself.

sanskrit: चञ्चलं हि मनः कृष्ण प्रमाथि बलवद्\u200cदृढम् । तस्याहं निग्रहं मन्ये वायोरिव सुदुष्करम् ॥ ६.३४ ॥
hindi: क्योंकि हे श्रीकृष्ण ! यह मन बड़ा चञ्चल, प्रमथन स्वभाववाला, बड़ा दृढ़ और बलवान् है । इसलिये उसका वशमें करना मैं वायुको रोकनेकी भाँति अत्यन्त दुष्कर मानता हूँ|
english: Dear Krishna, the mind is truly very unstable, forceful and strong. It is just as difficult to control as the flow of the wind.
explanation: Dear Krishna, the mind is truly very unstable, forceful and strong. It is just as difficult to control as the flow of the wind.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । असंशयं महाबाहो मनो दुर्निग्रहं चलम् अभ्यासेन तु कौन्तेय वैराग्येण च गृह्यते ॥ ६.३५...
hindi: हे महाबाहो ! निःसन्देह मन चञ्चल और कठिनतासे वशमें होनेवाला है; परन्तु हे कुन्तीपुत्र अर्जुन ! यह अभ्यास और वैराग्यसे वशमें होता है|
english: Lord Krishna divinely replied: Dear Arjuna, undoubtedly, the mind, as you say, is difficult to control, yet with paractice, determination and detachment, it can be controlled.
explanation: Lord Krishna divinely replied: Dear Arjuna, undoubtedly, the mind, as you say, is difficult to control, yet with paractice, determination and detachment, it can be controlled.

sanskrit: असंयतात्मना योगो दुष्प्राप इति मे मतिः । वश्यात्मना तु यतता शक्योऽवाप्तुमुपायतः ॥ ६.३६ ॥
hindi: जिसका मन वशमें किया हुआ नहीं है, ऐसे पुरुषद्वारा योग दुष्प्राप्य है और वशमें किये हुए मनवाले प्रयत्नशील पुरुषद्वारा साधनसे उसका प्राप्त होना सहज है – यह मेरा मत है|
english: Lord Krishna continued: In my opinion, O Arjuna, without a controlled mind, it is difficult for one to attain Yoga (attaining God). However, with a reasonable effort, the Yoga of even-mindedness (path to achieving the Lord) can be achieved by a person who has learned to control his senses.
explanation: Lord Krishna continued: In my opinion, O Arjuna, without a controlled mind, it is difficult for one to attain Yoga (attaining God). However, with a reasonable effort, the Yoga of even-mindedness (path to achieving the Lord) can be achieved by a person who has learned to control his senses.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । अयतिः श्रद्धयोपेतो योगाच्चलितमानसः अप्राप्य योगसंसिद्धिं कां गतिं कृष्ण गच्छति ॥ ६.३...
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—हे श्रीकृष्ण ! जो योगमें श्रद्धा रखनेवाला है; किन्तु संयमी नहीं है, इस कारण जिसका मन अन्तकालमें योगसे विचलित हो गया है, ऐसा साधक योगकी सिद्धिको अर्थात् भगवत्साक्षात्कारको न प्राप्त होकर किस गतिको प्राप्त होता है|
english: Arjuna asked the Lord: Dear Lord Krishna, what becomes of a man who has a firm belief in Yoga and has set foot on the path of Yoga, but allows his mind to deviate or stray from this path which leads to perfection?
explanation: Arjuna asked the Lord: Dear Lord Krishna, what becomes of a man who has a firm belief in Yoga and has set foot on the path of Yoga, but allows his mind to deviate or stray from this path which leads to perfection?

sanskrit: कच्चिन्नोभयविभ्रष्टश्छिन्नाभ्रमिव नश्यति । अप्रतिष्ठो महाबाहो विमूढो ब्रह्मणः पथि ॥ ६.३८ ॥
hindi: हे महाबाहो ! क्या वह भगवत्प्राप्तिके मार्गमें मोहित और आश्रयरहित पुरुष छिन्न-भिन्न बादलकी भाँति दोनों ओरसे भ्रष्ट होकर नष्ट तो नहीं हो जाता ?
english: Arjuna continued: What happens to a man who can no longer continue on this path leading to the attainment of God (Yoga)? Is he destroyed and does he lose both worlds of Yoga (God-realization) and that of worldly enjoyment just as the clouds are scattered by the winds?
explanation: Arjuna continued: What happens to a man who can no longer continue on this path leading to the attainment of God (Yoga)? Is he destroyed and does he lose both worlds of Yoga (God-realization) and that of worldly enjoyment just as the clouds are scattered by the winds?

sanskrit: एतन्मे संशयं कृष्ण छेत्तुमर्हस्यशेषतः । त्वदन्यः संशयस्यास्य छेत्ता न ह्युपपद्यते ॥ ६.३९ ॥
hindi: हे श्रीकृष्ण ! मेरे इस संशयको सम्पूर्णरूपसे छेदन करनेके लिये आप ही योग्य हैं, क्योंकि आपके सिवा दूसरा इस संशयका छेदन करनेवाला मिलना सम्भव नहीं है|
english: Lord Krishna, this is one of the doubts I have in my mind. You can remove it entirely. If anybody can remove all my doubts Krishna, it is You, and only You. Nobody else can clear My doubts completely.
explanation: Lord Krishna, this is one of the doubts I have in my mind. You can remove it entirely. If anybody can remove all my doubts Krishna, it is You, and only You. Nobody else can clear My doubts completely.

sanskrit: प्राप्य पुण्यकृतां लोकानुषित्वा शाश्वतीः समाः । शुचीनां श्रीमतां गेहे योगभ्रष्टोऽभिजायते ॥ ६.४१ ॥
hindi: योगभ्रष्ट पुरुष पुण्यवानोंके लोकोंको अर्थात् स्वर्गादि उत्तम लोकोंको प्राप्त होकर, उनमें बहुत वर्षोंतक निवास करके फिर शुद्ध आचरणवाले श्रीमान् पुरुषोंके घरमें जन्म लेता है|
english: The unsuccessful person in Yoga, Dear Arjuna, achieves an abode or home in heaven, the place of pious, pure. He stays there for a long time and after a while, takes birth in the house of noble people of good conduct.
explanation: The unsuccessful person in Yoga, Dear Arjuna, achieves an abode or home in heaven, the place of pious, pure. He stays there for a long time and after a while, takes birth in the house of noble people of good conduct.

sanskrit: अथवा योगिनामेव कुले भवति धीमताम् । एतद्धि दुर्लभतरं लोके जन्म यदीदृशम् ॥ ६.४२ ॥
hindi: अथवा वैराग्यवान् पुरुष उन लोकोंमें न जाकर ज्ञानवान् योगियोंके ही कुलमें जन्म लेता है । परन्तु इस प्रकारका जो यह जन्म है, सो संसारमें निःसन्देह अत्यन्त दुर्लभ है|
english: Dear Arjuna, if he does not take birth in a noble family of good conduct, then he will be born into a family of wise yogis.Such a birth in the world is difficult to find and can only be achieved if your actions are pious, good-natured and unsinful.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, if he does not take birth in a noble family of good conduct, then he will be born into a family of wise yogis.Such a birth in the world is difficult to find and can only be achieved if your actions are pious, good-natured and unsinful.

sanskrit: तत्र तं बुद्धिसंयोगं लभते पौर्वदेहिकम् । यतते च ततो भूयः संसिद्धौ कुरुनन्दन ॥ ६.४३ ॥
hindi: वहाँ उस पहले शरीरमें संग्रह किये हुए बुद्धि संयोगको अर्थात् समबुद्धिरूप योगके संस्कारोंको अनायास ही प्राप्त हो जाता है और हे कुरुनन्दन! उसके प्रभावसे वह फिर परमात्माकी प्राप्तिरूप सिद्धिके लिये पहलेसे भी बढ़कर प्रयत्न करता है|
english: When a man takes birth in his next life, he attains the wisdom he had achieved from the pious actions he performed in the pious actions of his past life, he tries harder once more to achieve true eternal peace and happiness in God through Yoga.
explanation: When a man takes birth in his next life, he attains the wisdom he had achieved from the pious actions he performed in the pious actions of his past life, he tries harder once more to achieve true eternal peace and happiness in God through Yoga.

sanskrit: पूर्वाभ्यासेन तेनैव ह्रियते ह्यवशोऽपि सः । जिज्ञासुरपि योगस्य शब्दब्रह्मातिवर्तते ॥ ६.४४ ॥
hindi: वह श्रीमानोंके घरमें जन्म लेनेवाला योगभ्रष्ट पराधीन हुआ भी उस पहलेके अभ्याससे ही निःसन्देह भगवान्की ओर आकर्षित किया जाता है, तथा समबुद्धिरूप योगका जिज्ञासु भी वेदमें कहे हुए सकाम कर्मोंके फलको उल्लंघन कर जाता है|
english: As a result of the religious practices of his past life, he remains free of attachments and is attracted towards God by constantly practising Yoga although he may be under bad and unfavourable influences.
explanation: As a result of the religious practices of his past life, he remains free of attachments and is attracted towards God by constantly practising Yoga although he may be under bad and unfavourable influences.

sanskrit: प्रयत्नाद्यतमानस्तु योगी संशुद्धकिल्बिषः । अनेकजन्मसंसिद्धस्ततो याति परां गतिम् ॥ ६.४५ ॥
hindi: परन्तु प्रयत्नपूर्वक अभ्यास करनेवाला योगी तो पिछले अनेक जन्मोंके संस्कारबलसे इसी जन्ममें संसिद्ध होकर सम्पूर्ण पापोंसे रहित हो फिर तत्काल ही परमगतिको प्राप्त हो जाता है|
english: After practicing Yoga during many births, there by destroying all sins and totally purifying the Self, the Yoga attains the supreme state, i.e. Salvation (total liberation from the world).
explanation: After practicing Yoga during many births, there by destroying all sins and totally purifying the Self, the Yoga attains the supreme state, i.e. Salvation (total liberation from the world).

sanskrit: तपस्विभ्योऽधिको योगी ज्ञानिभ्योऽपि मतोऽधिकः । कर्मिभ्यश्चाधिको योगी तस्माद्योगी भवार्जुन ॥ ६.४६ ॥
hindi: योगी तपस्वियोंसे श्रेष्ठ है, शास्त्रज्ञानियोंसे भी श्रेष्ठ माना गया है और सकाम कर्म करनेवालोंसे भी योगी श्रेष्ठ है; इससे हे अर्जुन ! तू योगी हो|
english: Lord Krishna stated: O Arjuna, the Yogi is superior to all those who perform religious sacrifices and superior to those who read holy scriptures and, of course, to those who perform attached Karma. Therefore, Arjuna, you should strive to be a Yogi.
explanation: Lord Krishna stated: O Arjuna, the Yogi is superior to all those who perform religious sacrifices and superior to those who read holy scriptures and, of course, to those who perform attached Karma. Therefore, Arjuna, you should strive to be a Yogi.

sanskrit: योगिनामपि सर्वेषां मद्गतेनान्तरात्मना । श्रद्धावान् भजते यो मां स मे युक्ततमो मतः ॥ ६.४७ ॥
hindi: सम्पूर्ण योगियोंमें भी जो श्रद्धावान् योगी मुझमें लगे हुए अन्तरात्मासे मुझको निरन्तर भजता है, वह योगी मुझे परम श्रेष्ठ मान्य है|
english: Of all the Yogis, the one who has complete faith in Me, whose mind is attached to Me only, and who continually worships Me, is absolutely the superior among all Yogis.
explanation: Of all the Yogis, the one who has complete faith in Me, whose mind is attached to Me only, and who continually worships Me, is absolutely the superior among all Yogis.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । मय्यासक्तमनाः पार्थ योगं युञ्जन्मदाश्रयः असंशयं समग्रं मां यथा ज्ञास्यसि तच्छृणु ॥...
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले-हे पार्थ ! अनन्यप्रेमसे मुझमें आसक्तचित्त तथा अनन्यभावसे मेरे परायण होकर योगमें लगा हुआ तू जिस प्रकार से सम्पूर्ण विभूति, बल, ऐश्वर्यादि गुणोंसे युक्त, सबके आत्मरूप मुझको संशयरहित जानेगा, उसको सुन|
english: Lord Krishna further explained: Dear Arjuna, with your mind fully absorbed in thoughts of Me and in the practice of Yoga as well, with total reliance on Me alone, listen to the secret of how to really know Me in entirety.
explanation: Lord Krishna further explained: Dear Arjuna, with your mind fully absorbed in thoughts of Me and in the practice of Yoga as well, with total reliance on Me alone, listen to the secret of how to really know Me in entirety.

sanskrit: ज्ञानं तेऽहं सविज्ञानमिदं वक्ष्याम्यशेषतः । यज्ज्ञात्वा नेह भूयोऽन्यज्ज्ञातव्यमवशिष्यते ॥ ७.२ ॥
hindi: मैं तेरे लिये इस विज्ञानसहित तत्त्वज्ञानको सम्पूर्णतया कहूँगा, जिसको जानकर संसारमें फिर और कुछ भी जाननेयोग्य शेष नहीं रह जाता|
english: After I divulge this secret to you, the knowledge you will have attained from this secret of the Supreme (God) will make all other knowledge seem worthless for you, O Arjuna.
explanation: After I divulge this secret to you, the knowledge you will have attained from this secret of the Supreme (God) will make all other knowledge seem worthless for you, O Arjuna.

sanskrit: मनुष्याणां सहस्त्रेषु कश्र्चिद्यतति सिद्धये । यततामपि सिद्धानां कश्र्चिन्मां वेत्ति तत्त्वतः ॥ ७.३ ...
hindi: हजारों मनुष्यों में कोई एक मेरी प्राप्तिके लिये यत्न करता है और उन यत्न करनेवाले योगियों में भी कोई एक मेरे परायण होकर मुझको तत्त्वसे अर्थात् यथार्थरूपसे जानता है |
english: It is very difficult to know Me fully in reality, dear Arjuna. Out of thousands of people, only a few special ones (Yogis or divine devotees) try to realize Me. Even out of those perfect people trying to realize Me, only a few succeed in doing so. Hardly anybody know My reality.
explanation: It is very difficult to know Me fully in reality, dear Arjuna. Out of thousands of people, only a few special ones (Yogis or divine devotees) try to realize Me. Even out of those perfect people trying to realize Me, only a few succeed in doing so. Hardly anybody know My reality.

sanskrit: भूमिरापोऽनलो वायुः खं मनो बुद्धिरेव च । अहंकार इतीयं मे भिन्ना प्रकृतिरष्टधा ॥ ७.४ ॥
hindi: पृथ्वी, जल, अग्नि, वायु, आकाश, मन, बुद्धि और अहंकार भी — इस प्रकार यह आठ प्रकारसे विभाजित मेरी – प्रकृति है । यह आठ प्रकारके भेदोंवाली तो अपरा अर्थात् मेरी जड़ प्रकृति है और हे महाबाहो ! इससे दूसरीको, जिससे यह सम्पूर्ण जगत् धारण किया जाता है, मेरीजीवरूपा परा अर्थात् चेतन प्रकृति जान
english: My nature,dear Arjuna, is formed by eight elements, namely, earth, fire, wind, water, sky, mind, intellect and ego. O Arjuna, understand that the elements I have just mentioned to you are only part of My lower nature. The other part of Me is My higher nature, which preserves the universe.
explanation: My nature,dear Arjuna, is formed by eight elements, namely, earth, fire, wind, water, sky, mind, intellect and ego. O Arjuna, understand that the elements I have just mentioned to you are only part of My lower nature. The other part of Me is My higher nature, which preserves the universe.

sanskrit: अपरेयमितस्त्वन्यां प्रकृतिं विद्धि मे पराम् । जीवभूतां महाबाहो ययेदं धार्यते जगत् ॥ ७.५ ॥
hindi: पृथ्वी, जल, अग्नि, वायु, आकाश, मन, बुद्धि और अहंकार भी — इस प्रकार यह आठ प्रकारसे विभाजित मेरी – प्रकृति है । यह आठ प्रकारके भेदोंवाली तो अपरा अर्थात् मेरी जड़ प्रकृति है और हे महाबाहो ! इससे दूसरीको, जिससे यह सम्पूर्ण जगत् धारण किया जाता है, मेरीजीवरूपा परा अर्थात् चेतन प्रकृति जान
english: My nature,dear Arjuna, is formed by eight elements, namely, earth, fire, wind, water, sky, mind, intellect and ego. O Arjuna, understand that the elements I have just mentioned to you are only part of My lower nature. The other part of Me is My higher nature, which preserves the universe.
explanation: My nature,dear Arjuna, is formed by eight elements, namely, earth, fire, wind, water, sky, mind, intellect and ego. O Arjuna, understand that the elements I have just mentioned to you are only part of My lower nature. The other part of Me is My higher nature, which preserves the universe.

sanskrit: एतद्योनीनि भूतानि सर्वाणीत्युपधारय । अहं कृत्स्नस्य जगतः प्रभवः प्रलयस्तथा ॥ ७.६ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! तू ऐसा समझ कि सम्पूर्ण भूत इन दोनों प्रकृतियोंसे ही उत्पन्न होनेवाले हैं और मैं सम्पूर्ण जगत्का प्रभव तथा प्रलय हूँ अर्थात् सम्पूर्ण जगत्का मूलकारण हूँ|
english: The Lord spoke solemnly: O Arjuna, you must understand that I have created all beings in these two aspects of my nature. Arjuna, Know Me as both the creator and the destroyer of the world.
explanation: The Lord spoke solemnly: O Arjuna, you must understand that I have created all beings in these two aspects of my nature. Arjuna, Know Me as both the creator and the destroyer of the world.

sanskrit: मत्तः परतरं नान्यत्किंचिदस्ति धनंजय । मयि सर्वमिदं प्रोतं सूत्रे मणिगणा इव ॥ ७.७ ॥
hindi: हे धनञ्जय! मुझसे भिन्न दूसरा कोई भी परम कारण नहीं है। यह सम्पूर्ण जगत् सूत्रमें सूत्रके मनियोंके सदृश मुझमें गुँथा हुआ है|
english: Arjuna, there is in reality absolutely nothing else but Me, I am all there is in this whole universe and everything is threaded into Me like the pearls in a necklace.
explanation: Arjuna, there is in reality absolutely nothing else but Me, I am all there is in this whole universe and everything is threaded into Me like the pearls in a necklace.

sanskrit: रसोऽहमप्सु कौन्तेय प्रभास्मि शशिसूर्ययोः । प्रणवः सर्ववेदेषु शब्दः खे पौरुषं नृषु ॥ ७.८ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! मैं जलमें रस हूँ, चन्द्रमा और सूर्यमें प्रकाश हूँ, सम्पूर्ण वेदोंमें ओंकार हूँ, आकाश में शब्द और पुरुषों में पुरुषत्व हूँ|
english: Dear Arjuna, I am the essence (the life) of water. I am the light in the Moon and the Sun; I am the “OM” in all of the Vedas (Holy Scriptures of the Hindu Religion). I am the sound and vibrations in the sky and the manliness in all men.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, I am the essence (the life) of water. I am the light in the Moon and the Sun; I am the “OM” in all of the Vedas (Holy Scriptures of the Hindu Religion). I am the sound and vibrations in the sky and the manliness in all men.

sanskrit: पुण्यो गन्धः पृथिव्यां च तेजश्चास्मि विभावसौ । जीवनं सर्वभूतेषु तपश्चास्मि तपस्विषु ॥ ७.९ ॥
hindi: मैं पृथ्वीमें पवित्र गन्ध और अग्निमें तेज हूँ तथा सम्पूर्ण भूतोंमें उनका जीवन हूँ और तपस्वियोंमें तप हूँ|
english: I am the aroma (fragrance) in the earth, the radiance in the fire. I am “life” in all beings, and I represent the sacrifice in all religious and sacrificial ceremonies.
explanation: I am the aroma (fragrance) in the earth, the radiance in the fire. I am “life” in all beings, and I represent the sacrifice in all religious and sacrificial ceremonies.

sanskrit: बलं बलवतां चाहं कामरागविवर्जितम् । धर्माविरुद्धो भूतेषु कामोऽस्मि भरतर्षभ ॥ ७.११ ॥
hindi: हे भरतश्रेष्ठ ! मैं बलवानोंका आसक्ति और कामनाओंसे रहित बल अर्थात् सामर्थ्य हूँ और सब भूतोंमें धर्मके अनुकूल अर्थात् शास्त्र के अनुकूल काम हूँ|
english: Arjuna, my dear devotee, I am the strength in those that are strong and who are free from desire and attachment. I am the controlled, passion in all beings not contrary to Dharma.
explanation: Arjuna, my dear devotee, I am the strength in those that are strong and who are free from desire and attachment. I am the controlled, passion in all beings not contrary to Dharma.

sanskrit: ये चैव सात्त्विका भावा राजसास्तामसाश्च ये । मत्त एवेति तान्विद्धि न त्वहं तेषु ते मयि ॥ ७.१२ ॥
hindi: और भी जो सत्त्वगुणसे उत्पन्न होनेवाले भाव हैं और जो रजोगुणसे तथा तमोगुणसे होनेवाले भाव हैं, उन सबको तू ‘मुझसे ही होनेवाले हैं’ ऐसा जान, परन्तु वास्तवमें* उनमें मैं और वे मुझमें नहीं हैं|
english: Arjuna, I am also all the thoughts borne out of Sattvik (pure), Rajasik (high activity) and Tamasik (evil) elements that surround this world. Consider them all as created by Me. However, always remember, I am neither in them, nor are they in me.
explanation: Arjuna, I am also all the thoughts borne out of Sattvik (pure), Rajasik (high activity) and Tamasik (evil) elements that surround this world. Consider them all as created by Me. However, always remember, I am neither in them, nor are they in me.

sanskrit: त्रिभिर्गुणमयैर्भावैरेभिः सर्वमिदं जगत् । मोहितं नाभिजानाति मामेभ्यः परमव्ययम् ॥ ७.१३ ॥
hindi: गुणोंके कार्यरूप सात्त्विक, राजस और तामस – – इन तीनों प्रकारके भावोंसे यह सारा संसार – प्राणिसमुदाय मोहित हो रहा है, इसीलिये इन तीनों गुणोंसे परे मुझ अविनाशीको नहीं जानता|
english: The whole universe, o Son of Kunti, is deluded by the Sattvik, Rajasik, and Tamasik Gunas (Components or Parts of nature). However,the truth is that I, the Supreme, Imperishable God, am above all of these Gunas.
explanation: The whole universe, o Son of Kunti, is deluded by the Sattvik, Rajasik, and Tamasik Gunas (Components or Parts of nature). However,the truth is that I, the Supreme, Imperishable God, am above all of these Gunas.

sanskrit: दैवी ह्येषा गुणमयी मम माया दुरत्यया । मामेव ये प्रपद्यन्ते मायामेतां तरन्ति ते ॥ ७.१४ ॥
hindi: क्योंकि यह अलौकिक अर्थात् अति अद्भुत त्रिगुणमयी मेरी माया बड़ी दुस्तर है; परन्तु जो पुरुष केवल मुझको ही निरन्तर भजते हैं, वे इस मायाको उल्लंघन कर जाते हैं अर्थात् संसार से तर जाते हैं|
english: Because My divine nature (many) consisting of these three parts, is very powerful,only those who continuously worship me, rise above these three Gunas (parts of nature) and cease to be deluded by them.
explanation: Because My divine nature (many) consisting of these three parts, is very powerful,only those who continuously worship me, rise above these three Gunas (parts of nature) and cease to be deluded by them.

sanskrit: न मां दुष्कृतिनो मूढाः प्रपद्यन्ते नराधमाः । माययापहृतज्ञाना आसुरं भावमाश्रिताः ॥ ७.१५ ॥
hindi: मायाके द्वारा जिनका ज्ञान हरा जा चुका है ऐसे आसुर-स्वभावको धारण किये हुए, मनुष्योंमें नीच, दूषित कर्म करनेवाले मूढ़लोग मुझको नहीं भजते|
english: Those who have lost their Gyan (wisdom) because of the pursuit of power (maya) and those who are evil in nature and are constantly engaged in evil deeds, do not worship Me, O Arjuna.
explanation: Those who have lost their Gyan (wisdom) because of the pursuit of power (maya) and those who are evil in nature and are constantly engaged in evil deeds, do not worship Me, O Arjuna.

sanskrit: चतुर्विधा भजन्ते मां जनाः सुकृतिनोऽर्जुन । आर्तो जिज्ञासुरर्थार्थी ज्ञानी च भरतर्षभ ॥ ७.१६ ॥
hindi: हे भरतवंशियोंमें श्रेष्ठ अर्जुन ! उत्तम कर्म करनेवाले अर्थार्थी’, आर्त, जिज्ञासु और ज्ञानी – ऐसे चार – प्रकारके भक्तजन मुझको भजते हैं|
english: In this world there are only four types of pure and divine (pious) people who worship Me,dear Arjuna; those in distress, the seekers of knowledge and wisdom, the wise (Yogis) and those who desire material wealth.
explanation: In this world there are only four types of pure and divine (pious) people who worship Me,dear Arjuna; those in distress, the seekers of knowledge and wisdom, the wise (Yogis) and those who desire material wealth.

sanskrit: तेषां ज्ञानी नित्ययुक्त एकभक्तिर्विशिष्यते । प्रियो हि ज्ञानिनोऽत्यर्थमहं स च मम प्रियः ॥ ७.१७ ॥
hindi: उनमें नित्य मुझमें एकीभावसे स्थित अनन्य प्रेमभक्तिवाला ज्ञानी भक्त अति उत्तम है, क्योंकि मुझको तत्त्वसे जाननेवाले ज्ञानीको मैं अत्यन्त प्रिय हूँ और वह ज्ञानी मुझे अत्यन्त प्रिय है|
english: Among all of these, O Arjuna, only the wise who are always thinking of Me with true love and devotion, are special and dear to Me, and I am dear to them as well.
explanation: Among all of these, O Arjuna, only the wise who are always thinking of Me with true love and devotion, are special and dear to Me, and I am dear to them as well.

sanskrit: उदाराः सर्व एवैते ज्ञानी त्वात्मैव मे मतम् । आस्थितः स हि युक्तात्मा मामेवानुत्तमां गतिम् ॥ ७.१८ ॥
hindi: ये सभी उदार हैं, परन्तु ज्ञानी तो साक्षात् मेरा स्वरूप ही है – ऐसा मेरा मत है; क्योंकि वह मद्गत मन-बुद्धिवाला ज्ञानी भक्त अति उत्तम गतिस्वरूप मुझमें ही अच्छी प्रकार स्थित है|
english: Although all of those who worship Me,Arjuna, are dear and sublime to Me, But because I regard a Gyani (man of wisdom) or Yogi to be of my own image, that Yogi will always reside in Me, the Almighty.
explanation: Although all of those who worship Me,Arjuna, are dear and sublime to Me, But because I regard a Gyani (man of wisdom) or Yogi to be of my own image, that Yogi will always reside in Me, the Almighty.

sanskrit: बहूनां जन्मनामन्ते ज्ञानवान्मां प्रपद्यते । वासुदेवः सर्वमिति स महात्मा सुदुर्लभः ॥ ७.१९ ॥
hindi: बहुत जन्मोंके अन्तके जन्ममें तत्त्वज्ञानको प्राप्त पुरुष, सब कुछ वासुदेव ही है – इस प्रकार मुझको भजता है, वह महात्मा अत्यन्त दुर्लभ है|
english: A Gyani or wise man who worship Me with great love and devotion during many or all of his birth, truly realizes Me as the “be-all” and the “end-all”. And he is considered by Me to be a great sage.
explanation: A Gyani or wise man who worship Me with great love and devotion during many or all of his birth, truly realizes Me as the “be-all” and the “end-all”. And he is considered by Me to be a great sage.

sanskrit: यो यो यां यां तनुं भक्तः श्रद्धयार्चितुमिच्छति । तस्य तस्याचलां श्रद्धां तामेव विदधाम्यहम् ॥ ७.२१ ॥
hindi: जो जो सकाम भक्त जिस-जिस देवताके स्वरूपको – श्रद्धासे पूजना चाहता है, उस-उस भक्तकी श्रद्धाको मैं उसी देवताके प्रति स्थिर करता हूँ|
english: Whichever god (deity) a person wishes to worship with faith, O Arjuna, I am the one who establishes or builds his faith in that deity.
explanation: Whichever god (deity) a person wishes to worship with faith, O Arjuna, I am the one who establishes or builds his faith in that deity.

sanskrit: स तया श्रद्धया युक्तस्तस्याराधनमीहते । लभते च ततः कामान्मयैव विहितान्हि तान् ॥ ७.२२ ॥
hindi: वह पुरुष उस श्रद्धासे युक्त होकर उस देवताका पूजन करता है और उस देवतासे मेरे द्वारा ही विधान किये हुए उन इच्छित भोगोंको निःसन्देह प्राप्त करता है|
english: Thus, once these people have been given their faith by Me, the devotees try to worship the deities they choose to worship, and they ultimately achieve their desires as ordered and directed by Me, the Deity of deities
explanation: Thus, once these people have been given their faith by Me, the devotees try to worship the deities they choose to worship, and they ultimately achieve their desires as ordered and directed by Me, the Deity of deities

sanskrit: अन्तवत्तु फलं तेषां तद्भवत्यल्पमेधसाम् । देवान्देवयजो यान्ति मद्भक्ता यान्ति मामपि ॥ ७.२३ ॥
hindi: परन्तु उन अल्प बुद्धिवालोंका वह फल नाशवान् है तथा वे देवताओंको पूजनेवाले देवताओंको प्राप्त होते हैं और मेरे भक्त चाहे जैसे ही भजें, अन्तमें वे मुझको ही प्राप्त होते हैं|
english: The Lord said solemnly: But the reward of those ignorant people who worship other deities is only temporary. Those who worship other deities go to those deities after death but those who worship Me, attain Me, and come to Me.
explanation: The Lord said solemnly: But the reward of those ignorant people who worship other deities is only temporary. Those who worship other deities go to those deities after death but those who worship Me, attain Me, and come to Me.

sanskrit: अव्यक्तं व्यक्तिमापन्नं मन्यन्ते मामबुद्धयः । परं भावमजानन्तो ममाव्ययमनुत्तमम् ॥ ७.२४ ॥
hindi: बुद्धिहीन पुरुष मेरे अनुत्तम अविनाशी परम भावको न जानते हुए मन इन्द्रियोंसे परे मुझ – सच्चिदानन्दघन परमात्माको मनुष्यकी भाँति जन्मकर व्यक्तिभावको प्राप्त हुआ मानते हैं|
english: Dear Arjuna, those people who have little intelligence fail to regard Me as the Supreme, indestructible, the Almighty, and unmanifest (not readily perceived by the senses); instead, they regard Me as a mere mortal and ordinary human being.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, those people who have little intelligence fail to regard Me as the Supreme, indestructible, the Almighty, and unmanifest (not readily perceived by the senses); instead, they regard Me as a mere mortal and ordinary human being.

sanskrit: नाहं प्रकाशः सर्वस्य योगमायासमावृतः । मूढोऽयं नाभिजानाति लोको मामजमव्ययम् ॥ ७.२५ ॥
hindi: अपनी योगमायासे छिपा हुआ मैं सबके प्रत्यक्ष नहीं होता, इसलिये यह अज्ञानी जनसमुदाय मुझ जन्मरहित अविनाशी परमेश्वरको नहीं जानता अर्थात् मुझको जन्मने-मरनेवाला समझता है|
english: Shrouded by My own Yogmaya (divine powers), I am not visible to everybody. Those who are ignorant, however, do not know Me as unborn and indestructible (eternal). They will never be able to see Me, O Arjuna. Only those who are dear and devoted to Me, see Me.
explanation: Shrouded by My own Yogmaya (divine powers), I am not visible to everybody. Those who are ignorant, however, do not know Me as unborn and indestructible (eternal). They will never be able to see Me, O Arjuna. Only those who are dear and devoted to Me, see Me.

sanskrit: वेदाहं समतीतानि वर्तमानानि चार्जुन । भविष्याणि च भूतानि मां तु वेद न कश्चन ॥ ७.२६ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! पूर्वमें व्यतीत हुए और वर्तमानमें स्थित तथा आगे होनेवाले सब भूतोंको मैं जानता हूँ, परन्तु मुझको कोई भी श्रद्धा-भक्तिरहित पुरुष नहीं जानता|
english: O Arjuna, although I know of every single being who was in the past, who is at the present, and who will be in the future, nobody really knows Me.
explanation: O Arjuna, although I know of every single being who was in the past, who is at the present, and who will be in the future, nobody really knows Me.

sanskrit: इच्छाद्वेषसमुत्थेन द्वन्द्वमोहेन भारत । सर्वभूतानि संमोहं सर्गे यान्ति परन्तप ॥ ७.२७ ॥
hindi: हे भरतवंशी अर्जुन ! संसारमें इच्छा और द्वेषसे उत्पन्न सुख-दुःखादि द्वन्द्वरूप मोहसे सम्पूर्ण प्राणी अत्यन्त अज्ञताको प्राप्त हो रहे हैं|
english: Arjuna, in this world, most beings are confused and deluded by the doubts created by desire and envy, and they become victims of ignorance and Agyan (lack of wisdom).
explanation: Arjuna, in this world, most beings are confused and deluded by the doubts created by desire and envy, and they become victims of ignorance and Agyan (lack of wisdom).

sanskrit: येषां त्वन्तगतं पापं जनानां पुण्यकर्मणाम् । ते द्वन्द्वमोहनिर्मुक्ता भजन्ते मां दृढव्रताः ॥ ७.२८ ॥
hindi: परन्तु निष्कामभावसे श्रेष्ठ कर्मोंका आचरण करनेवाले जिन पुरुषोंका पाप नष्ट हो गया है, वे राग द्वेषजनित द्वन्द्वरूप मोहसे मुक्त दृढ़निश्चयी भक्त मुझको सब प्रकारसे भजते हैं|
english: O Arjuna, there are, however, some pious people whose sins have been destroyed and are free from all worldly attachments, who worship Me with a firm, undeluded mind.
explanation: O Arjuna, there are, however, some pious people whose sins have been destroyed and are free from all worldly attachments, who worship Me with a firm, undeluded mind.

sanskrit: जरामरणमोक्षाय मामाश्रित्य यतन्ति ये । ते ब्रह्म तद्विदुः कृत्स्नमध्यात्मं कर्म चाखिलम् ॥ ७.२९ ॥
hindi: जो मेरे शरण होकर जरा और मरणसे छूटनेके लिये यत्न करते हैं, वे पुरुष उस ब्रह्मको, सम्पूर्ण अध्यात्मको, सम्पूर्ण कर्मको जानते हैं|
english: Arjuna, those who make an effort to attain Me and take refuge in Me, achieve deliverance from old age and death, and they also fully understand Brahma, (the infinite never-ending) Adhyatma (self) and all Karma (actions) in this world.
explanation: Arjuna, those who make an effort to attain Me and take refuge in Me, achieve deliverance from old age and death, and they also fully understand Brahma, (the infinite never-ending) Adhyatma (self) and all Karma (actions) in this world.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । किं तद्ब्रह्म किमध्यात्मं किं कर्म पुरुषोत्तम अधिभूतं च किं प्रोक्तमधिदैवं किमुच्यते...
hindi: अर्जुनने कहा – हे पुरुषोत्तम ! वह ब्रह्म क्या है ? – अध्यात्म क्या है ? कर्म क्या है ? अधिभूत नाम क्या कहा गया है और अधिदैव किसको कहते हैं|
english: Arjuna asked the Lord: Dear Krishna, I have often encountered the terms Brahman, Adhyatma, Karma, Adhibhutam and Adhidaivam, yet I fail to understand the true meaning of these.
explanation: Arjuna asked the Lord: Dear Krishna, I have often encountered the terms Brahman, Adhyatma, Karma, Adhibhutam and Adhidaivam, yet I fail to understand the true meaning of these.

sanskrit: अधियज्ञः कथं कोऽत्र देहेऽस्मिन्मधुसूदन । प्रयाणकाले च कथं ज्ञेयोऽसि नियतात्मभिः ॥ ८.२ ॥
hindi: हे मधुसूदन ! यहाँ अधियज्ञ कौन है ? और वह इस शरीरमें कैसे है ? तथा युक्तचित्तवाले पुरुषोंद्वारा अन्त समयमें आप किस प्रकार जाननेमें आते हैं|
english: Arjuna continued: Furthermore, O Krishna, I am puzzld by the Adhiyoga. Who is he? How does he dwell in one’s body? Lastly, dear Lord, how do true Yogis come to know you in the ultimate end.
explanation: Arjuna continued: Furthermore, O Krishna, I am puzzld by the Adhiyoga. Who is he? How does he dwell in one’s body? Lastly, dear Lord, how do true Yogis come to know you in the ultimate end.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । अक्षरं ब्रह्म परमं स्वभावोऽध्यात्ममुच्यते भूतभावोद्भवकरो विसर्गः कर्मसंज्ञितः ॥ ८....
hindi: श्रीभगवान्ने कहा– परम अक्षर ‘ब्रह्म’ है, अपना स्वरूप अर्थात् जीवात्मा ‘अध्यात्म’ नामसे कहा जाता है तथा भूतोंके भावको उत्पन्न करनेवाला जो त्याग है, वह ‘कर्म’ नामसे कहा गया है|
english: The Lord replied: Dear Arjuna, always remember that Brahma is the Supreme imperishable (everlasting); the Universal Soul. The Jeevatma or the soul within one’s body is known as Adhyatma.Karma is the offering made to the Gods that causes the creation or manifestation and also the preservation or sustenance of beings.
explanation: The Lord replied: Dear Arjuna, always remember that Brahma is the Supreme imperishable (everlasting); the Universal Soul. The Jeevatma or the soul within one’s body is known as Adhyatma.Karma is the offering made to the Gods that causes the creation or manifestation and also the preservation or sustenance of beings.

sanskrit: अधिभूतं क्षरो भावः पुरुषश्चाधिदैवतम् । अधियज्ञोऽहमेवात्र देहे देहभृतां वर ॥ ८.४ ॥
hindi: उत्पत्ति विनाश धर्मवाले सब पदार्थ अधिभूत – हैं, हिरण्यमय पुरुष * अधिदैव है और हे देहधारियों में श्रेष्ठ अर्जुन! इस शरीरमें मैं वासुदेव ही अन्तर्यामीरूपसे अधियज्ञ हूँ|
english: The Lord further explained: Adhibhutam represents all perishable or temporary objects. Brahma, the Universal Soul is the Adhidaivam. O Arjuna, I the Vasudeva, am Adhiyga here in this body and form.
explanation: The Lord further explained: Adhibhutam represents all perishable or temporary objects. Brahma, the Universal Soul is the Adhidaivam. O Arjuna, I the Vasudeva, am Adhiyga here in this body and form.

sanskrit: अन्तकाले च मामेव स्मरन्मुक्त्वा कलेवरम् । यः प्रयाति स मद्भावं याति नास्त्यत्र संशयः ॥ ८.५ ॥
hindi: जो पुरुष अन्तकालमें भी मुझको ही स्मरण करता हुआ शरीरको त्याग कर जाता है, वह मेरे साक्षात् स्वरूपको प्राप्त होता है – इसमें कुछ भी – संशय नहीं है|
english: Lord Krishna solemnly proclaimed: O Arjuna, he who thinks only of Me at the time of his death, undoubtedly will come to Me.
explanation: Lord Krishna solemnly proclaimed: O Arjuna, he who thinks only of Me at the time of his death, undoubtedly will come to Me.

sanskrit: यं यं वापि स्मरन्भावं त्यजत्यन्ते कलेवरम् । तं तमेवैति कौन्तेय सदा तद्भावभावितः ॥ ८.६ ॥
hindi: हे कुन्तीपुत्र अर्जुन ! यह मनुष्य अन्तकालमें जिस जिस भी भावको स्मरण करता हुआ शरीरका त्याग करता है, उस उसको ही प्राप्त होता है; क्योंकि वह सदा उसी भावसे भावित रहा है|
english: O Arjuna, whatever entity (being or object) one thinks about during the time of his death while leaving his body, that is what he shall become in his next life.
explanation: O Arjuna, whatever entity (being or object) one thinks about during the time of his death while leaving his body, that is what he shall become in his next life.

sanskrit: तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु मामनुस्मर युध्य च । मय्यर्पितमनोबुद्धिर्मामेवैष्यस्यसंशयम् ॥ ८.७ ॥
hindi: इसलिये हे अर्जुन! तू सब समयमें निरन्तर मेरा स्मरण कर और युद्ध भी कर । इस प्रकार मुझमें अर्पण किये हुए मन-बुद्धिसे युक्त होकर तू निःसन्देह मुझको ही प्राप्त होगा|
english: Therefore,O Arjuna, think of Me at all times, even while you fight this battle. If you surrender your mind and intellect to Me, dear friend, you will undoubtedly come to Me and unite with Me in heaven.
explanation: Therefore,O Arjuna, think of Me at all times, even while you fight this battle. If you surrender your mind and intellect to Me, dear friend, you will undoubtedly come to Me and unite with Me in heaven.

sanskrit: अभ्यासयोगयुक्तेन चेतसा नान्यगामिना । परमं पुरुषं दिव्यं याति पार्थानुचिन्तयन् ॥ ८.८ ॥
hindi: हे पार्थ ! यह नियम है कि परमेश्वरके ध्यानके अभ्यासरूप योगसे युक्त, दूसरी ओर न जानेवाले न चित्तसे निरन्तर चिन्तन करता हुआ मनुष्य परम प्रकाशरूप दिव्य पुरुषको अर्थात् परमेश्वरको ही प्राप्त होता है|
english: Arjuna, one who is constantly performing meditation upon God without letting his mind wander in any other direction, achieves supreme salvation (union with God)
explanation: Arjuna, one who is constantly performing meditation upon God without letting his mind wander in any other direction, achieves supreme salvation (union with God)

sanskrit: कविं पुराणमनुशासितार- मणोरणीयांसमनुस्मरेद्यः । सर्वस्य धातारमचिन्त्यरूप मादित्यवर्णं तमसः परस्तात...
hindi: जो पुरुष सर्वज्ञ, अनादि, सबके नियन्ता *, सूक्ष्मसे भी अति सूक्ष्म, सबके धारण-पोषण करनेवाले अचिन्त्यस्वरूप, सूर्यके सदृश नित्य चेतन प्रकाशरूप और अविद्यासे अति परे, शुद्ध सच्चिदानन्दघन परमेश्वरका स्मरण करता है|
english: Dear Arjuna, one who is constantly fixed in meditation upon God, who is the omniscient (everywhere), omnipotent (ever-powerful), infinite (never-ending) ruler over all being, preserver of everybody, whose form cannot be conceived readily by any being, who is as brilliant as the Sun, and who is beyond the darkness of ignorance.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, one who is constantly fixed in meditation upon God, who is the omniscient (everywhere), omnipotent (ever-powerful), infinite (never-ending) ruler over all being, preserver of everybody, whose form cannot be conceived readily by any being, who is as brilliant as the Sun, and who is beyond the darkness of ignorance.

sanskrit: यदक्षरं वेदविदो वदन्ति विशन्ति यद्यतयो वीतरागाः । यदिच्छन्तो ब्रह्मचर्यं चरन्ति तत्ते पदं संग्रहे...
hindi: वेदके जाननेवाले विद्वान् जिस सच्चिदानन्दघनरूप परमपदको अविनाशी कहते हैं, आसक्तिरहित यत्नशील संन्यासी महात्माजन जिसमें प्रवेश करते हैं और जिस परमपदको चाहनेवाले ब्रह्मचारी लोग ब्रह्मचर्यका आचरण करते हैं, उस परमपदको मैं तेरे लिये संक्षेपसे कहूँगा|
english: The Blessed Lord Spoke: O Arjuna, that which the scholars of the Vedas (those who study and are knowledgeable of the Vedas), who are self-controlled and passion-free. enter into, leading the life of celibacy and detachment from all things and being, this Supreme Being shall be made clear to you briefly.
explanation: The Blessed Lord Spoke: O Arjuna, that which the scholars of the Vedas (those who study and are knowledgeable of the Vedas), who are self-controlled and passion-free. enter into, leading the life of celibacy and detachment from all things and being, this Supreme Being shall be made clear to you briefly.

sanskrit: सर्वद्वाराणि संयम्य मनो हृदि निरुध्य च । मूर्ध्न्याधायात्मनः प्राणमास्थितो योगधारणाम् ॥ ८.१२ ॥
hindi: सब इन्द्रियोंके द्वारोंको रोककर तथा मनको हृद्देशमें स्थिर करके, फिर उस जीते हुए मनके द्वारा प्राणको मस्तकमें स्थापित करके, परमात्मसम्बन्धी योगधारणामें स्थित होकर जो पुरुष ‘ॐ’ इस एक अक्षररूप ब्रह्मको उच्चारण करता हुआ और उसके अर्थस्वरूप मुझ निर्गुण ब्रह्मका चिन्तन करता हुआ शरीरको त्याग कर जाता है, वह पुरुष परमगतिको प्राप्त होता है|
english: When a Yogi has fully controlled all of his senses, fixes his mind in the heart, concentrates on nothing but God, concentrates all of his life’s breath in his head, fully establishes his being in the practice of Yoga. Just as one is about to leave his body, he should chant “Om” as one of God’s many names, thinking of Me(the Lord) in the last few moments of his life. This is the key to the attainment of the Supreme state known as salvation.
explanation: When a Yogi has fully controlled all of his senses, fixes his mind in the heart, concentrates on nothing but God, concentrates all of his life’s breath in his head, fully establishes his being in the practice of Yoga. Just as one is about to leave his body, he should chant “Om” as one of God’s many names, thinking of Me(the Lord) in the last few moments of his life. This is the key to the attainment of the Supreme state known as salvation.

sanskrit: ओमित्येकाक्षरं ब्रह्म व्याहरन्मामनुस्मरन् > । यः प्रयाति त्यजन्देहं स याति परमां गतिम् ॥ ८.१३ ॥
hindi: एक-सरलीकृत ओम का उच्चारण करना - ब्रह्म का (प्रतीक) - और मुझे याद करते हुए, जो शरीर को छोड़कर चला जाता है, वह सर्वोच्च लक्ष्य प्राप्त करता है।
english: Uttering the one-syllabled OM — the (symbol of) BRAHMAN — and remembering Me, he who departs, leaving the body, attains the Supreme Goal.
explanation: Uttering the one-syllabled OM — the (symbol of) BRAHMAN — and remembering Me, he who departs, leaving the body, attains the Supreme Goal.

sanskrit: अनन्यचेताः सततं यो मां स्मरति नित्यशः । तस्याहं सुलभः पार्थ नित्ययुक्तस्य योगिनः ॥ ८.१४ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! जो पुरुष मुझमें अनन्य चित्त होकर सदा ही निरन्तर मुझ पुरुषोत्तमको स्मरण करता है, उस नित्य निरन्तर मुझमें युक्त हुए योगीके लिये मैं सुलभ – हूँ, अर्थात् उसे सहज ही प्राप्त हो जाता हूँ|
english: O Arjuna, the Yogi who is established in Me, with his mind constantly fixed on Me, continually remembering Me, can easily attain me.
explanation: O Arjuna, the Yogi who is established in Me, with his mind constantly fixed on Me, continually remembering Me, can easily attain me.

sanskrit: मामुपेत्य पुनर्जन्म दुःखालयमशाश्वतम् । नाप्नुवन्ति महात्मानः संसिद्धिं परमां गताः ॥ ८.१५ ॥
hindi: परम सिद्धिको प्राप्त महात्माजन मुझको प्राप्त होकर दुःखोंके घर एवं क्षणभंगुर पुनर्जन्मको नहीं प्राप्त होते|
english: O Arjuna, the great sages (wise men,Yogis) having achieved Supreme perfection in their life, come to Me, and do not take rebirth which is temporary and full of suffering.
explanation: O Arjuna, the great sages (wise men,Yogis) having achieved Supreme perfection in their life, come to Me, and do not take rebirth which is temporary and full of suffering.

sanskrit: आब्रह्मभुवनाल्लोकाः पुनरावर्तिनोऽर्जुन । मामुपेत्य तु कौन्तेय पुनर्जन्म न विद्यते ॥ ८.१६ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! ब्रह्मलोकपर्यन्त सब लोक पुनरावर्ती हैं, परन्तु हे कुन्तीपुत्र ! मुझको प्राप्त होकर पुनर्जन्म नहीं होता; क्योंकि मैं कालातीत हूँ और ये सब ब्रह्मादिके लोक कालके द्वारा सीमित होनेसे अनित्य हैं|
english: All the worlds in the universe, including this one, O Arjuna, are subject to appear and disappear, go and return again, to be created and recreated, but, Arjuna, when one has attained Me, he is never born again into this world of suffering and temporary pleasure.
explanation: All the worlds in the universe, including this one, O Arjuna, are subject to appear and disappear, go and return again, to be created and recreated, but, Arjuna, when one has attained Me, he is never born again into this world of suffering and temporary pleasure.

sanskrit: सहस्रयुगपर्यन्तमहर्यद्ब्रह्मणो विदुः । रात्रिं युगसहस्रान्तां तेऽहोरात्रविदो जनाः ॥ ८.१७ ॥
hindi: ब्रह्माका जो एक दिन है, उसको एक हजार चतुर्युगीतककी अवधिवाला और रात्रिको भी एक हजार चतुर्युगीतककी अवधिवाली जो पुरुष तत्त्वसे जानते हैं, वे योगीजन कालके तत्त्वको जाननेवाले हैं|
english: Those who knows that Brahma’s (the Supreme Creator) one day lasts 1,000 yugas and one night ends 1,000 yugus, truly know the essence of time.
explanation: Those who knows that Brahma’s (the Supreme Creator) one day lasts 1,000 yugas and one night ends 1,000 yugus, truly know the essence of time.

sanskrit: अव्यक्ताद्व्यक्तयः सर्वाः प्रभवन्त्यहरागमे । रात्र्यागमे प्रलीयन्ते तत्रैवाव्यक्तसंज्ञके ॥ ८.१८ ॥
hindi: सम्पूर्ण चराचर भूतगण ब्रह्माके दिनके प्रवेशकालमें अव्यक्तसे अर्थात् ब्रह्माके सूक्ष्म शरीरसे उत्पन्न होते हैं और ब्रह्माकी रात्रिके प्रवेशकालमें उस अव्यक्त नामक ब्रह्माके सूक्ष्मशरीरमें ही लीन हो जाते हैं|
english: Dear Arjuna, try to understand that all that is visible in this world comes out from within Brahma (Creator of the world) at the start of his day.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, try to understand that all that is visible in this world comes out from within Brahma (Creator of the world) at the start of his day.

sanskrit: भूतग्रामः स एवायं भूत्वा भूत्वा प्रलीयते । रात्र्यागमेऽवशः पार्थ प्रभवत्यहरागमे ॥ ८.१९ ॥
hindi: हे पार्थ! वही यह भूतसमुदाय उत्पन्न हो होकर प्रकृतिके वशमें हुआ रात्रिके प्रवेशकालमें लीन होता है और दिनके प्रवेशकालमें फिर उत्पन्न होता है|
english: O Arjuna, all beings in this world, by the force of their nature, are born again and again, and dissolve repeatedly as well. They perish and join Brahma at the start of his night, and are born again at the start of his day.
explanation: O Arjuna, all beings in this world, by the force of their nature, are born again and again, and dissolve repeatedly as well. They perish and join Brahma at the start of his night, and are born again at the start of his day.

sanskrit: अव्यक्तोऽक्षर इत्युक्तस्तमाहुः परमां गतिम् । यं प्राप्य न निवर्तन्ते तद्धाम परमं मम ॥ ८.२१ ॥
hindi: जो अव्यक्त ‘अक्षर’ इस नामसे कहा गया है, उसी अक्षर नामक अव्यक्तभावको परमगति कहते हैं तथा जिस सनातन अव्यक्तभावको प्राप्त होकर मनुष्य वापस नहीं आते, वह मेरा परम धाम है|
english: The unmanifest (uncreated) is eternal and indestructible, O son of Kunti, and is the ultimate goal for all beings to achieve.When one has finally reached this ultimate goal, he does not come back into this world of temporary pleasure and misery. He achieves supreme bliss, peace and contentment. He then lives forever in My Supreme Abode.
explanation: The unmanifest (uncreated) is eternal and indestructible, O son of Kunti, and is the ultimate goal for all beings to achieve.When one has finally reached this ultimate goal, he does not come back into this world of temporary pleasure and misery. He achieves supreme bliss, peace and contentment. He then lives forever in My Supreme Abode.

sanskrit: पुरुषः स परः पार्थ भक्त्या लभ्यस्त्वनन्यया । यस्यान्तःस्थानि भूतानि येन सर्वमिदं ततम् ॥ ८.२२ ॥
hindi: हे पार्थ जिस परमात्माके अन्तर्गत सर्वभूत हैं और जिस सच्चिदानन्दघन परमात्मासे यह समस्त जगत् परिपूर्ण है, वह सनातन अव्यक्त परम पुरुष तो अनन्य’ भक्तिसे ही प्राप्त होने योग्य है|
english: Dear Arjuna, that God within whom all beings are contained and that God who rules over all the universe, can be attained by complete devotion.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, that God within whom all beings are contained and that God who rules over all the universe, can be attained by complete devotion.

sanskrit: यत्र काले त्वनावृत्तिमावृत्तिं चैव योगिनः । प्रयाता यान्ति तं कालं वक्ष्यामि भरतर्षभ ॥ ८.२३ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! जिस कालमें शरीर त्याग कर गये हुए योगीजन तो वापस न लौटनेवाली गतिको और जिस कालमें गये हुए वापस लौटनेवाली गतिको ही प्राप्त होते हैं, उस कालको अर्थात् दोनों मार्गोंको कहूँगा|
english: Dear Arjuna, now I shall tell you of the two paths by which the Yogi returns (comes back and is born into this world again) and by which the Yogi does not return (is not born into this world again.)
explanation: Dear Arjuna, now I shall tell you of the two paths by which the Yogi returns (comes back and is born into this world again) and by which the Yogi does not return (is not born into this world again.)

sanskrit: अग्निर्ज्योतिरहः शुक्लः षण्मासा उत्तरायणम् । तत्र प्रयाता गच्छन्ति ब्रह्म ब्रह्मविदो जनाः ॥ ८.२४ ॥
hindi: जिस मार्गमें ज्योतिर्मय अग्नि-अभिमानी देवता है, दिनका अभिमानी देवता है, शुक्लपक्षका अभिमानी देवता है और उत्तरायणके छः महीनोंका अभिमानी देवता है, उस मार्गमें मरकर गये हुए ब्रह्मवेत्ता योगीजन उपर्युक्त देवताओंद्वारा क्रमसे ले जाये जाकर ब्रह्मको प्राप्त होते हैं|
english: Those Yogis who follow the path of fire, light, daytime, bright fortnight, and the six months of the northern path of the sun, go to Brahma and are not born into the world again.
explanation: Those Yogis who follow the path of fire, light, daytime, bright fortnight, and the six months of the northern path of the sun, go to Brahma and are not born into the world again.

sanskrit: धूमो रात्रिस्तथा कृष्णः षण्मासा दक्षिणायनम् । तत्र चान्द्रमसं ज्योतिर्योगी प्राप्य निवर्तते ॥ ८.२५ ...
hindi: जिस मार्गमें धूमाभिमानी देवता है, रात्रि अभिमानी देवता है तथा कृष्णपक्षका अभिमानी देवता है और दक्षिणायनके छः महीनोंका अभिमानी देवता है, उस मार्गमें मरकर गया हुआ सकाम कर्म करनेवाला योगी उपर्युक्त देवताओं द्वारा क्रमसे ले गया हुआ चन्द्रमाकी ज्योतिको प्राप्त होकर स्वर्गमें अपने शुभकर्मोंका फल भोगकर वापस आता है|
english: Those Yogis who follow the path of smoke, night-time, the dark fortnight, the six months of southern path, go to heaven and are eventually reborn back into the world.
explanation: Those Yogis who follow the path of smoke, night-time, the dark fortnight, the six months of southern path, go to heaven and are eventually reborn back into the world.

sanskrit: शुक्लकृष्णे गती ह्येते जगतः शाश्वते मते । एकया यात्यनावृत्तिमन्ययावर्तते पुनः ॥ ८.२६ ॥
hindi: क्योंकि जगत्के ये दो प्रकारके – शुक्ल और कृष्ण – – अर्थात् देवयान और पितृयान मार्ग सनातन माने गये हैं। इनमें एकके द्वारा गया हुआ * – जिससे वापस – – नहीं लौटना पड़ता, उस परम गतिको प्राप्त होता है और दूसरेके द्वारा गया हुआ * फिर वापस आता है अर्थात् जन्म-मृत्युको प्राप्त होता है|
english: The Blessed Lord Krishna continued: These bright and dark paths are considered to be the two original paths of the universe. By following the bright path, the Yogi reaches the Supreme State from where there is no return. Going by the other path, the Yogi is subject to birth and death as many times as he chooses to follow this path.
explanation: The Blessed Lord Krishna continued: These bright and dark paths are considered to be the two original paths of the universe. By following the bright path, the Yogi reaches the Supreme State from where there is no return. Going by the other path, the Yogi is subject to birth and death as many times as he chooses to follow this path.

sanskrit: नैते सृती पार्थ जानन्योगी मुह्यति कश्चन । तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु योगयुक्तो भवार्जुन ॥ ८.२७ ॥
hindi: हे पार्थ! इस प्रकार इन दोनों मार्गोंको तत्त्वसे जानकर कोई भी योगी मोहित नहीं होता। इस कारण हे अर्जुन ! तू सब कालमें समबुद्धिरूप योगसे युक्त हो अर्थात् निरन्तर मेरी प्राप्तिके लिये साधन करनेवाला हो|
english: O Arjuna, knowing these two paths, no Yogi ever becomes confused, deluded or unhappy. Therefore Arjuna, you should try to achieve Yoga, the Supreme state of happiness, at all times.
explanation: O Arjuna, knowing these two paths, no Yogi ever becomes confused, deluded or unhappy. Therefore Arjuna, you should try to achieve Yoga, the Supreme state of happiness, at all times.

sanskrit: वेदेषु यज्ञेषु तपःसु चैव दानेषु यत् पुण्यफलं प्रदिष्टम् । अत्येति तत्सर्वमिदं विदित्वा योगी परं स...
hindi: योगी पुरुष इस रहस्यको तत्त्वसे जानकर वेदोंके पढ़नेमें तथा यज्ञ, तप और दानादिके करनेमें जो पुण्यफल कहा है, उन सबको निःसन्देह उल्लंघन कर जाता है और सनातन परमपदको प्राप्त होता है|
english: Whatever achievements are obtained by the study of the Vedas, by sacrifices, and by giving to charities, the Yogi goes beyond all of these achievements and achieves the ultimate goal and learns the ultimate secret: the attainment of the eternal Supreme state by constantly practising Yoga.
explanation: Whatever achievements are obtained by the study of the Vedas, by sacrifices, and by giving to charities, the Yogi goes beyond all of these achievements and achieves the ultimate goal and learns the ultimate secret: the attainment of the eternal Supreme state by constantly practising Yoga.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । इदं तु ते गुह्यतमं प्रवक्ष्याम्यनसूयवे ज्ञानं विज्ञानसहितं यज्ज्ञात्वा मोक्ष्यसेऽश...
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले- तुझ दोषदृष्टिरहित भक्तके लिये इस परम गोपनीय विज्ञानसहित ज्ञानको पुनः भलीभाँति कहूँगा, जिसको जानकर तू दुःखरूप संसारसे मुक्त हो जायगा|
english: Lord Krishna continued: Dear Arjuna, I shall explain to you this ultimate secret and Gyan which is the knowledge of all that is manifest (to emerge from Brahma and be born in this world) and all that is unmanifest (to become one with Brahma and forever be liberated from this world of suffering).
explanation: Lord Krishna continued: Dear Arjuna, I shall explain to you this ultimate secret and Gyan which is the knowledge of all that is manifest (to emerge from Brahma and be born in this world) and all that is unmanifest (to become one with Brahma and forever be liberated from this world of suffering).

sanskrit: राजविद्या राजगुह्यं पवित्रमिदमुत्तमम् । प्रत्यक्षावगमं धर्म्यं सुसुखं कर्तुमव्ययम् ॥ ९.२ ॥
hindi: यह विज्ञानसहित ज्ञान सब विद्याओंका राजा, सब गोपनीयोंका राजा, अति पवित्र, अति उत्तम, प्रत्यक्ष फलवाला, धर्मयुक्त, साधन करनेमें बड़ा सुगम और अविनाशी है|
english: This Gyan is the most significant secret knowledge in the universe, O Arjuna. It is very pure and helpful to all beings. It produces direct and favourable results. This virtuous secret is easy to practice and is imperishable.
explanation: This Gyan is the most significant secret knowledge in the universe, O Arjuna. It is very pure and helpful to all beings. It produces direct and favourable results. This virtuous secret is easy to practice and is imperishable.

sanskrit: अश्रद्दधानाः पुरुषा धर्मस्यास्य परन्तप । अप्राप्य मां निवर्तन्ते मृत्युसंसारवर्त्मनि ॥ ९.३ ॥
hindi: हे परंतप! इस उपर्युक्त धर्ममें श्रद्धारहित पुरुष मुझको न प्राप्त होकर मृत्युरूप संसारचक्रमें भ्रमण करते रहते हैं|
english: Arjuna, those people who do not have faith in these principles and in this secret knowledge do not attain Me (the ultimate goal) and thus, move into a world if darkness and death.
explanation: Arjuna, those people who do not have faith in these principles and in this secret knowledge do not attain Me (the ultimate goal) and thus, move into a world if darkness and death.

sanskrit: मया ततमिदं सर्वं जगदव्यक्तमूर्तिना । मत्स्थानि सर्वभूतानि न चाहं तेष्ववस्थितः ॥ ९.४ ॥
hindi: मुझ निराकार परमात्मासे यह सब जगत् जलसे बरफके सदृश परिपूर्ण है और सब भूत मेरे अन्तर्गत संकल्पके आधार स्थित हैं, किन्तु वास्तवमें मैं उनमें स्थित नहीं हूँ|
english: I am present in all of the universe (on every world) in my unmanifest (unseen) form. All beings are contained in Me but I am not always contained in them.
explanation: I am present in all of the universe (on every world) in my unmanifest (unseen) form. All beings are contained in Me but I am not always contained in them.

sanskrit: न च मत्स्थानि भूतानि पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम् । भूतभृन्न च भूतस्थो ममात्मा भूतभावनः ॥ ९.५ ॥
hindi: वे सब भूत मुझमें स्थित नहीं हैं; किन्तु मेरी ईश्वरीय योगशक्तिको देख कि भूतोंका धारण-पोषण करनेवाला और भूतोंको उत्पन्न करनेवाला भी मेरा आत्मा वास्तवमें भूतोंमें स्थित नहीं है|
english:
O Arjuna, you must also understand that all the beings in this universe are not within Me.
Behold the effects of My Yoga (spiritual power), though I sustain and create all beings, in reality, My Self dwells not in these beings.
explanation:
O Arjuna, you must also understand that all the beings in this universe are not within Me.
Behold the effects of My Yoga (spiritual power), though I sustain and create all beings, in reality, My Self dwells not in these beings.

sanskrit: यथाकाशस्थितो नित्यं वायुः सर्वत्रगो महान् । तथा सर्वाणि भूतानि मत्स्थानीत्युपधारय ॥ ९.६ ॥
hindi: जैसे आकाशसे उत्पन्न सर्वत्र विचरनेवाला महान् वायु सदा आकाशमें ही स्थित है, वैसे ही मेरे संकल्पद्वारा उत्पन्न होनेसे सम्पूर्ण भूत मुझमें स्थित हैं, ऐसा जान|
english: Arjuna, you must clearly understand that just as the vast wind moves in all directions in the sky, similarly all beings are placed in Me.
explanation: Arjuna, you must clearly understand that just as the vast wind moves in all directions in the sky, similarly all beings are placed in Me.

sanskrit: सर्वभूतानि कौन्तेय प्रकृतिं यान्ति मामिकाम् । कल्पक्षये पुनस्तानि कल्पादौ विसृजाम्यहम् ॥ ९.७ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! कल्पोंके अन्तमें सब भूत मेरी प्रकृतिको प्राप्त होते हैं अर्थात् प्रकृतिमें लीन होते हैं और कल्पोंके आदिमें उनको मैं फिर रचता हूँ|
english: O Arjuna, all beings realize and attain My true nature at the end of Brahma’s Day knows as Kalpa. I, the Supreme Being, create them again at the beginning of every Kalpa.
explanation: O Arjuna, all beings realize and attain My true nature at the end of Brahma’s Day knows as Kalpa. I, the Supreme Being, create them again at the beginning of every Kalpa.

sanskrit: प्रकृतिं स्वामवष्टभ्य विसृजामि पुनः पुनः । भूतग्राममिमं कृत्स्नमवशं प्रकृतेर्वशात् ॥ ९.८ ॥
hindi: अपनी प्रकृतिको अंगीकार करके स्वभावके बलसे परतन्त्र हुए इस सम्पूर्ण भूतसमुदायको बार-बार उनके कर्मों के अनुसार रचता हूँ|
english: O Arjuna, I create all beings again and again according to their karma (performed actions in their past life) out of My Maya (spiritually powerful nature).
explanation: O Arjuna, I create all beings again and again according to their karma (performed actions in their past life) out of My Maya (spiritually powerful nature).

sanskrit: न च मां तानि कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनंजय । उदासीनवदासीनमसक्तं तेषु कर्मसु ॥ ९.९ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! उन कर्मोंमें आसक्तिरहित और वे उदासीनके सदृश स्थित मुझ परमात्माको वे कर्म नहीं बाँधते|
english: Dear Arjuna, Karma has no affect on Me whatsoever. I am unattached and indifferent to Karma. I have no bondage to Karma at all.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, Karma has no affect on Me whatsoever. I am unattached and indifferent to Karma. I have no bondage to Karma at all.

sanskrit: अवजानन्ति मां मूढा मानुषीं तनुमाश्रितम् । परं भावमजानन्तो मम भूतमहेश्वरम् ॥ ९.११ ॥
hindi: मेरे परमभावको न जाननेवाले मूढलोग मनुष्यका शरीर धारण करनेवाले मुझ सम्पूर्ण भूतोंके महान् ईश्वरको तुच्छ समझते हैं अर्थात् अपनी योगमायासे संसारके उद्धार के लिये मनुष्यरूपमें विचरते हुए मुझ परमेश्वरको साधारण मनुष्य मानते हैं|
english: Not knowing and fully understanding My Supreme Nature, all ignorant and unspiritual people in this world regard Me as insignificant when I am in human form. They fail to see and realize that I am the Lord of all beings.
explanation: Not knowing and fully understanding My Supreme Nature, all ignorant and unspiritual people in this world regard Me as insignificant when I am in human form. They fail to see and realize that I am the Lord of all beings.

sanskrit: मोघाशा मोघकर्माणो मोघज्ञाना विचेतसः । राक्षसीमासुरीं चैव प्रकृतिं मोहिनीं श्रिताः ॥ ९.१२ ॥
hindi: वे व्यर्थ आशा, व्यर्थ कर्म और व्यर्थ ज्ञानवाले विक्षिप्तचित्त अज्ञानीजन राक्षसी, आसुरी और मोहिनी प्रकृतिको’ ही धारण किये रहते हैं|
english: The Lord spoke onward: These ignorant people with futile hopes, vain actions (Karma), and false knowledge (spiritual and non-spiritual Gyan) have a misleading and evil nature.
explanation: The Lord spoke onward: These ignorant people with futile hopes, vain actions (Karma), and false knowledge (spiritual and non-spiritual Gyan) have a misleading and evil nature.

sanskrit: महात्मानस्तु मां पार्थ दैवीं प्रकृतिमाश्रिताः । भजन्त्यनन्यमनसो ज्ञात्वा भूतादिमव्ययम् ॥ ९.१३ ॥
hindi: परन्तु हे कुन्तीपुत्र ! दैवी प्रकृतिके आश्रित महात्माजन मुझको सब भूतोंका सनातन कारण और नाशरहित अक्षरस्वरूप जानकर अनन्य मनसे युक्त होकर निरन्तर भजते हैं|
english: But, Arjuna, always heed that all saints, Yogis and wise men, with their godly, spiritual nature,regard Me as the prime cause of all beings (the Creator of the world) and indestructible. They worship Me with one-mindedness, never letting their minds go astray and be affected by worldly objects, attachment to Karma, and false Gyan.
explanation: But, Arjuna, always heed that all saints, Yogis and wise men, with their godly, spiritual nature,regard Me as the prime cause of all beings (the Creator of the world) and indestructible. They worship Me with one-mindedness, never letting their minds go astray and be affected by worldly objects, attachment to Karma, and false Gyan.

sanskrit: सततं कीर्तयन्तो मां यतन्तश्च दृढव्रताः । नमस्यन्तश्च मां भक्त्या नित्ययुक्ता उपासते ॥ ९.१४ ॥
hindi: वे दृढ़ निश्चयवाले भक्तजन निरन्तर मेरे नाम और गुणोंका कीर्तन करते हुए तथा मेरी प्राप्तिके लिये यत्न करते हुए और मुझको बार बार प्रणाम करते हुए सदा मेरे ध्यानमें युक्त होकर अनन्य प्रेमसे मेरी उपासना करते हैं|
english: True devotees of mine, O Arjuna, always have a firm belief in Me, constantly chant My name, bowing before Me, are always absorbed in My thought and worship Me with true love and devotion.
explanation: True devotees of mine, O Arjuna, always have a firm belief in Me, constantly chant My name, bowing before Me, are always absorbed in My thought and worship Me with true love and devotion.

sanskrit: ज्ञानयज्ञेन चाप्यन्ये यजन्तो मामुपासते । एकत्वेन पृथक्त्वेन बहुधा विश्वतोमुखम् ॥ ९.१५ ॥
hindi: दूसरे ज्ञानयोगी मुझ निर्गुण-निराकार ब्रह्मका ज्ञानयज्ञके द्वारा अभिन्नभावसे पूजन हुए भी मेरी उपासना करते हैं और दूसरे मनुष्य बहुत प्रकारसे स्थित मुझ विराट्स्वरूप परमेश्वरकी पृथक् भावसे उपासना करते हैं|
english: Several people worship Me in different ways, My dear friend.
