Some choose to worship Me with their offering of knowledge (Gyan Yagya); others worship Me in my absolute (formless) form as part of their own self; and still others choose to worship Me as their Divine Master, in My several different and diverse forms. However, Arjuna, realize that I am One and Universal even though I take on several forms.
explanation: Several people worship Me in different ways, My dear friend. Some choose to worship Me with their offering of knowledge (Gyan Yagya); others worship Me in my absolute (formless) form as part of their own self; and still others choose to worship Me as their Divine Master, in My several different and diverse forms. However, Arjuna, realize that I am One and Universal even though I take on several forms.

sanskrit: अहं क्रतुरहं यज्ञः स्वधाहमहमौषधम् । मन्त्रोऽहमहमेवाज्यमहमग्निरहं हुतम् ॥ ९.१६ ॥
hindi: क्रतु मैं हूँ, यज्ञ मैं हूँ, स्वधा मैं हूँ, ओषधि मैं हूँ, मन्त्र मैं हूँ, घृत मैं हूँ, अग्नि मैं हूँ और हवनरूप क्रिया भी मैं ही हूँ|
english:
Arjuna, you must understand that I am everything in this world.
I am the Vedic rituals; I am the sacrifice and the offerings (Yogya); I am the represent all herbal life
I am the Mantra (Vedic); I am purified butter; I am fire; I am the very act of offering in sacrifices.
explanation:
Arjuna, you must understand that I am everything in this world.
I am the Vedic rituals; I am the sacrifice and the offerings (Yogya); I am the represent all herbal life
I am the Mantra (Vedic); I am purified butter; I am fire; I am the very act of offering in sacrifices.

sanskrit: पिताहमस्य जगतो माता धाता पितामहः । वेद्यं पवित्रमोंकार ऋक्साम यजुरेव च ॥ ९.१७ ॥
hindi: इस सम्पूर्ण जगत्का धाता अर्थात् धारण करनेवाला एवं कर्मोंके फलको देनेवाला, पिता, माता, पितामह, जाननेयोग्य,’ पवित्र ओंकार तथा ऋग्वेद, सामवेद और यजुर्वेद भी मैं ही हूँ|
english:
I am the sustainer, the father,mother, and grandfather of the whole universe. I represent all that is knowable and worth knowing
I am the Supreme Purifier of all things in the Universe and I represent all of the Vedas in the Universe also, namely, Rig Veda, Yajur Veda and Sama Veda.
explanation:
I am the sustainer, the father,mother, and grandfather of the whole universe. I represent all that is knowable and worth knowing
I am the Supreme Purifier of all things in the Universe and I represent all of the Vedas in the Universe also, namely, Rig Veda, Yajur Veda and Sama Veda.

sanskrit: गतिर्भर्ता प्रभुः साक्षी निवासः शरणं सुहृत् । प्रभवः प्रलयः स्थानं निधानं बीजमव्ययम् ॥ ९.१८ ॥
hindi: प्राप्त होनेयोग्य परम धाम, भरण-पोषण करनेवाला, सबका स्वामी, शुभाशुभका देखनेवाला, सबका वासस्थान, शरण लेनेयोग्य, प्रत्युपकार न चाहकर हित करनेवाला, सबकी उत्पत्ति प्रलयका हेतु, – स्थितिका आधार, निधान’ और अविनाशी कारण भी मैं ही हूँ|
english:
O Dear Arjuna, I support and preserve all the creation in the universe; I am the Supreme Lord of all; the witness of all occurrences, the shelter; the refuge; the well-wisher of all beings; the absolute beginning and origin of things, and the absolute end termination of all things.
Furthermore, Arjuna, I am the resting place and storage place (refuge) into which all beings come together when the time of universal destruction is at hand. Know Me also, as the one imperishable, indestructible seed from which all beings in the universe are cultivated.
explanation:
O Dear Arjuna, I support and preserve all the creation in the universe; I am the Supreme Lord of all; the witness of all occurrences, the shelter; the refuge; the well-wisher of all beings; the absolute beginning and origin of things, and the absolute end termination of all things.
Furthermore, Arjuna, I am the resting place and storage place (refuge) into which all beings come together when the time of universal destruction is at hand. Know Me also, as the one imperishable, indestructible seed from which all beings in the universe are cultivated.

sanskrit: तपाम्यहमहं वर्षं निगृह्णाम्युत्सृजामि च । अमृतं चैव मृत्युश्च सदसच्चाहमर्जुन ॥ ९.१९ ॥
hindi: मैं ही सूर्यरूपसे तपता हूँ, वर्षाका आकर्षण करता हूँ और उसे बरसाता हूँ। हे अर्जुन ! मैं ही अमृत और मृत्यु हूँ और सत् असत् भी मैं – ही हूँ|
english:
O Arjuna, I am the giver of heat; I am responsible also, for the sending and holding back of rain for the nourishment of all life.
You must understand, My dear friend, that I am the very nectar (the juice) of life within all beings, and at the same time, I am the death of all beings. Arjuna, I am all that is real and unreal in this universe.
explanation:
O Arjuna, I am the giver of heat; I am responsible also, for the sending and holding back of rain for the nourishment of all life.
You must understand, My dear friend, that I am the very nectar (the juice) of life within all beings, and at the same time, I am the death of all beings. Arjuna, I am all that is real and unreal in this universe.

sanskrit: ते तं भुक्त्वा स्वर्गलोकं विशालं क्षीणे पुण्ये मर्त्यलोकं विशन्ति । एवं त्रयीधर्ममनुप्रपन्ना गताग...
hindi: वे उस विशाल स्वर्गलोकको भोगकर पुण्य क्षीण होनेपर मृत्युलोकको प्राप्त होते हैं। इस प्रकार स्वर्गके साधनरूप तीनों वेदोंमें कहे हुए सकामकर्मका आश्रय लेनेवाले और भोगोंकी कामनावाले पुरुष बार बार आवागमनको प्राप्त – होते हैं, अर्थात् पुण्यके प्रभावसे स्वर्गमें जाते हैं और पुण्य क्षीण होनेपर मृत्युलोकमें आते हैं|
english:
However, Arjuna, after all of their good Karma (action) has expired, the enjoyment of all of the happiness, joy and peace that they have encountered in heaven ends as well, and therefore, they are reborn in the world (subject to the cycle of birth and death) once more.
Therefore, Arjuna, all beings who perform attached Karma (actions performed for the purpose of gaining something, i.e. fruits, in return for the action), are always born and reborn into this cycle of birth and death according to the three Vedas.
explanation:
However, Arjuna, after all of their good Karma (action) has expired, the enjoyment of all of the happiness, joy and peace that they have encountered in heaven ends as well, and therefore, they are reborn in the world (subject to the cycle of birth and death) once more.
Therefore, Arjuna, all beings who perform attached Karma (actions performed for the purpose of gaining something, i.e. fruits, in return for the action), are always born and reborn into this cycle of birth and death according to the three Vedas.

sanskrit: अनन्याश्चिन्तयन्तो मां ये जनाः पर्युपासते । तेषां नित्याभियुक्तानां योगक्षेमं वहाम्यहम् ॥ ९.२२ ॥
hindi: जो अनन्यप्रेमी भक्तजन मुझ परमेश्वरको निरन्तर चिन्तन करते हुए निष्कामभावसे भजते हैं, उन नित्य-निरन्तर मेरा चिन्तन करनेवाले पुरुषोंका योगक्षेम मैं स्वयं प्राप्त कर देता हूँ|
english: However, Arjuna, for those beings who worship Me with a fixed mind, meditating and constantly thinking of Me, worshipping Me without any desire for rewards in return for their worship, are granted full refuge and salvation in My Supreme Abode (Heaven). These devotees are never reborn in this cycles of birth and death and attain a place in My Abode for Eternity.
explanation: However, Arjuna, for those beings who worship Me with a fixed mind, meditating and constantly thinking of Me, worshipping Me without any desire for rewards in return for their worship, are granted full refuge and salvation in My Supreme Abode (Heaven). These devotees are never reborn in this cycles of birth and death and attain a place in My Abode for Eternity.

sanskrit: येऽप्यन्यदेवताभक्ता यजन्ते श्रद्धयान्विताः । तेऽपि मामेव कौन्तेय यजन्त्यविधिपूर्वकम् ॥ ९.२३ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! यद्यपि श्रद्धासे युक्त जो सकाम भक्त दूसरे देवताओंको पूजते हैं, वे भी मुझको ही पूजते हैं; किन्तु उनका वह पूजन अविधिपूर्वक अर्थात् अज्ञानपूर्वक है|
english: Arjuna, all of those devotees of mine who perform Attached Karma and who have faith in the various Deities (who are all part of and representatives of Me in reality), actually worship Me. However, this worship is really being done out ignorance, (lack of proper knowledge about Me.)
explanation: Arjuna, all of those devotees of mine who perform Attached Karma and who have faith in the various Deities (who are all part of and representatives of Me in reality), actually worship Me. However, this worship is really being done out ignorance, (lack of proper knowledge about Me.)

sanskrit: अहं हि सर्वयज्ञानां भोक्ता च प्रभुरेव च । न तु मामभिजानन्ति तत्त्वेनातश्च्यवन्ति ते ॥ ९.२४ ॥
hindi: क्योंकि सम्पूर्ण यज्ञोंका भोक्ता और स्वामी भी मैं ही हूँ; परन्तु वे मुझ परमेश्वरको तत्त्वसे नहीं जानते, इसीसे गिरते हैं अर्थात् पुनर्जन्मको प्राप्त होते हैं|
english: Arjuna, I am the Supreme Lord and receiver of all sacred sacrifices. However, those devotees who worship Me for some sort of motive or reward, really do not knows Me, and therefore, they shall always fall in this cycle of birth and death.
explanation: Arjuna, I am the Supreme Lord and receiver of all sacred sacrifices. However, those devotees who worship Me for some sort of motive or reward, really do not knows Me, and therefore, they shall always fall in this cycle of birth and death.

sanskrit: यान्ति देवव्रता देवान्पितॄन्यान्ति पितृव्रताः । भूतानि यान्ति भूतेज्या यान्ति मद्याजिनोऽपि माम् ॥ ९...
hindi: देवताओंको पूजनेवाले देवताओंको प्राप्त होते हैं, पितरोंको पूजनेवाले पितरोंको प्राप्त होते हैं, भूतोंको पूजनेवाले भूतोंको प्राप्त होते हैं और मेरा पूजन करनेवाले भक्त मुझको ही प्राप्त होते हैं । इसलिये मेरे भक्तोंका पुनर्जन्म नहीं होता|
english: Arjuna, a person only gets what he worship for. Those who worship Deities, attain them. Those who worship ancestors, attain them. Those who worship the spirits, attain spirits, and of course, those who worship Me, will undoubtedly attain Me.
explanation: Arjuna, a person only gets what he worship for. Those who worship Deities, attain them. Those who worship ancestors, attain them. Those who worship the spirits, attain spirits, and of course, those who worship Me, will undoubtedly attain Me.

sanskrit: पत्रं पुष्पं फलं तोयं यो मे भक्त्या प्रयच्छति । तदहं भक्त्युपहृतमश्नामि प्रयतात्मनः ॥ ९.२६ ॥
hindi: जो कोई भक्त मेरे लिये प्रेमसे पत्र, पुष्प, फल, जल आदि अर्पण करता है, उस शुद्धबुद्धि निष्काम प्रेमी भक्तका प्रेमपूर्वक अर्पण किया हुआ वह पत्र पुष्पादि मैं सगुणरूपसे प्रकट होकर प्रीतिसहित – खाता हूँ|
english: I accept with love, all of the offerings that My selfless devotees present to Me (devotedly) in the form of leaves, flowers, fruits and water.
explanation: I accept with love, all of the offerings that My selfless devotees present to Me (devotedly) in the form of leaves, flowers, fruits and water.

sanskrit: यत्करोषि यदश्नासि यज्जुहोषि ददासि यत् । यत्तपस्यसि कौन्तेय तत्कुरुष्व मदर्पणम् ॥ ९.२७ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन! तू जो कर्म करता है, जो खाता है, जो हवन करता है, जो दान देता है और जो तप करता है, वह सब मेरे अर्पण कर|
english: Arjuna, whatever you do, whatever your actions are, whatever you sacrifice and give, and whatever your religious and sacred parctices may be, offer all of these to Me, dear friend.
explanation: Arjuna, whatever you do, whatever your actions are, whatever you sacrifice and give, and whatever your religious and sacred parctices may be, offer all of these to Me, dear friend.

sanskrit: शुभाशुभफलैरेवं मोक्ष्यसे कर्मबन्धनैः । संन्यासयोगयुक्तात्मा विमुक्तो मामुपैष्यसि ॥ ९.२८ ॥
hindi: इस प्रकार, जिसमें समस्त कर्म मुझ भगवान्के अर्पण होते हैं – ऐसे संन्यासयोगसे युक्त चित्तवाला तू शुभाशुभ फलरूप कर्मबन्धनसे मुक्त हो जायगा और उनसे मुक्त होकर मुझको ही प्राप्त होगा|
english: With your mind religiously and devotedly established in Sannyaas Yoga (offering all of your actions to Me), and therefore being fully released from the bondages and ties to worldly pleasures which result from attachment to Karma (good and bad Karma), you shall ultimately, and definitely, attain Me.
explanation: With your mind religiously and devotedly established in Sannyaas Yoga (offering all of your actions to Me), and therefore being fully released from the bondages and ties to worldly pleasures which result from attachment to Karma (good and bad Karma), you shall ultimately, and definitely, attain Me.

sanskrit: समोऽहं सर्वभूतेषु न मे द्वेष्योऽस्ति न प्रियः । ये भजन्ति तु मां भक्त्या मयि ते तेषु चाप्यहम् ॥ ९.२...
hindi: मैं सब भूतोंमें समभावसे व्यापक हूँ, नकोई मेरा अप्रिय है और न प्रिय है; परन्तु जोभक्त मुझको प्रेमसे भजते हैं, वे मुझमें हैं और मैं भी उनमें प्रत्यक्ष प्रकट हूँ|
english: I regard all beings with equality and with even-mindedness. I neither hate nor love anybody, nor do I like or dislike anyone. However, those who choose to worship Me, with everlasting and pure devotion, are always in Me, and I am in them.
explanation: I regard all beings with equality and with even-mindedness. I neither hate nor love anybody, nor do I like or dislike anyone. However, those who choose to worship Me, with everlasting and pure devotion, are always in Me, and I am in them.

sanskrit: क्षिप्रं भवति धर्मात्मा शश्वच्छान्तिं निगच्छति । कौन्तेय प्रति जानीहि न मे भक्तः प्रणश्यति ॥ ९.३१ ॥
hindi: वह शीघ्र ही धर्मात्मा हो जाता है और सदा रहनेवाली परम शान्तिको प्राप्त होता है । हे अर्जुन! तू निश्चयपूर्वक सत्य जान कि मेरा भक्त नष्ट नहीं होता|
english: This evil man will then soon become a very pure and pious man in time. He will then attain eternal peace and happiness, Realize this truth O Arjuna, that he who is My true devotees, shall never suffer destruction.
explanation: This evil man will then soon become a very pure and pious man in time. He will then attain eternal peace and happiness, Realize this truth O Arjuna, that he who is My true devotees, shall never suffer destruction.

sanskrit: मां हि पार्थ व्यपाश्रित्य येऽपि स्युः पापयोनयः । स्त्रियो वैश्यास्तथा शूद्रास्तेऽपि यान्ति परां गति...
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! स्त्री, वैश्य, शूद्र तथा पापयोनि– चाण्डालादि जो कोई भी हों, वे भी मेरे शरण होकर परमगतिको ही प्राप्त होते हैं|
english: Dear Arjuna, by taking refuge in Me, (the true path to bliss and joy), a sinful person, a women, a businessman, and even an untouchable person, will attain, the Supreme state just as the virtuous Brahman, and the devoted great royal sages and wise men.
explanation: Dear Arjuna, by taking refuge in Me, (the true path to bliss and joy), a sinful person, a women, a businessman, and even an untouchable person, will attain, the Supreme state just as the virtuous Brahman, and the devoted great royal sages and wise men.

sanskrit: किं पुनर्ब्राह्मणाः पुण्या भक्ता राजर्षयस्तथा । अनित्यमसुखं लोकमिमं प्राप्य भजस्व माम् ॥ ९.३३ ॥
hindi: फिर इसमें तो कहना ही क्या है, जो पुण्यशील ब्राह्मण तथा राजर्षि भक्तजन मेरी शरण होकर परमगतिको प्राप्त होते हैं । इसलिये तू सुखरहित और क्षणभङ्गुर इस मनुष्य शरीरको प्राप्त होकर निरन्तर मेरा ही भजन कर|
english: O Arjuna, this world is one that is quickly passing, very brief and full of sufferings. Having been born here in such a world, the only way that one can attain true happiness and peace is to worship Me.
explanation: O Arjuna, this world is one that is quickly passing, very brief and full of sufferings. Having been born here in such a world, the only way that one can attain true happiness and peace is to worship Me.

sanskrit: मन्मना भव मद्भक्तो मद्याजी मां नमस्कुरु । मामेवैष्यसि युक्त्वैवमात्मानं मत्परायणः ॥ ९.३४ ॥
hindi: मुझमें मनवाला हो, मेरा भक्त बन, मेरा पूजन करनेवाला हो, मुझको प्रणाम कर । इस प्रकार आत्माको मुझमें नियुक्त करके मेरे परायण होकर तू मुझको ही प्राप्त होगा|
english: Arjuna, fix your mind only on Me; be my true, dedicated and sincere devotee; offer all sacrifices to Me; bow to Me. Having these things with Me always in mind, you will come to Me inevitably.
explanation: Arjuna, fix your mind only on Me; be my true, dedicated and sincere devotee; offer all sacrifices to Me; bow to Me. Having these things with Me always in mind, you will come to Me inevitably.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । भूय एव महाबाहो शृणु मे परमं वचः यत्तेऽहं प्रीयमाणाय वक्ष्यामि हितकाम्यया ॥ १०.१ ॥
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले—- हे महाबाहो ! फिर भी मेरे परम रहस्य और प्रभाव युक्त्त वचन को सुन, जिसे मै तुझ अतिशय प्रेम रखने वाले के लिये हित की इच्छा से कहूँगा |
english: Arjuna, my dear devotee, hear and understand these wise words (full of the highest and most divine knowledge) which I shall disclose to you, for your own good.
explanation: Arjuna, my dear devotee, hear and understand these wise words (full of the highest and most divine knowledge) which I shall disclose to you, for your own good.

sanskrit: न मे विदुः सुरगणाः प्रभवं न महर्षयः । अहमादिर्हि देवानां महर्षीणां च सर्वशः ॥ १०.२ ॥
hindi: मेरी उत्पति को अर्थात्त् लीला से प्रकट होने को न देवता लोग जानते है और न महषि जन ही जानते है; क्योंकि मै सब प्रकार से देवताओ का और महषियों का भी आदिकारण हूँ |
english: Even the Deities and the greatest of wiseman do not know the secret of my birth in this world (in human form). You should understand,my dear friend, that it is from ME that all of these Deities and wisemen originate.
explanation: Even the Deities and the greatest of wiseman do not know the secret of my birth in this world (in human form). You should understand,my dear friend, that it is from ME that all of these Deities and wisemen originate.

sanskrit: यो मामजमनादिं च वेत्ति लोकमहेश्वरम् । असंमूढः स मर्त्येषु सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते ॥ १०.३ ॥
hindi: जो मुझको अजन्मा  अर्थात्त् वास्तव में जन्मरहित, अनादि और लोकों का महान ईश्वर तत्व से जानना है, वह मनुष्यों में ज्ञानवान् पुरुष सम्पूर्ण पापो से मुक्त्त हो जाता है|
english: The Blessed Lord declared: He who fully understands ME (in all respects) as being without a beginning or an end,and Lord of the universe,is truly the wisest person among all men and is released from all his sins.
explanation: The Blessed Lord declared: He who fully understands ME (in all respects) as being without a beginning or an end,and Lord of the universe,is truly the wisest person among all men and is released from all his sins.

sanskrit: बुद्धिर्ज्ञानमसंमोहः क्षमा सत्यं दमः शमः । सुखं दुःखं भवोऽभावो भयं चाभयमेव च ॥ १०.४ ॥
hindi: निश्चय करने की शक्त्ति, यथार्थ ज्ञान,  असम्मूढता, क्षमा, सत्य, इन्द्रियों का वश में करना, मन का निग्रह तथा सुख-दुःख, उत्पत्ति-प्रलय और भय-अभय तथा अहिंसा, समता, संतोष, तप, दान, कीर्ति और अपकीर्ति–ऎसे ये प्राणियो के नाना प्रकार के भाव मुझ से ही होते है|
english: The intellect, the GYAN (Supreme Knowledge), understanding, forbearance, truth, control over the mind and senses, joys, sorrows, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, non-violence, even-mindedness, contentment, austerity, charity, fame, infamy, all of these and other diverse elements that surround life in this world, arise and begin from ME, the Supreme Soul.
explanation: The intellect, the GYAN (Supreme Knowledge), understanding, forbearance, truth, control over the mind and senses, joys, sorrows, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, non-violence, even-mindedness, contentment, austerity, charity, fame, infamy, all of these and other diverse elements that surround life in this world, arise and begin from ME, the Supreme Soul.

sanskrit: अहिंसा समता तुष्टिस्तपो दानं यशोऽयशः । भवन्ति भावा भूतानां मत्त एव पृथग्विधाः ॥ १०.५ ॥
hindi: निश्चय करने की शक्त्ति, यथार्थ ज्ञान,  असम्मूढता, क्षमा, सत्य, इन्द्रियों का वश में करना, मन का निग्रह तथा सुख-दुःख, उत्पत्ति-प्रलय और भय-अभय तथा अहिंसा, समता, संतोष, तप, दान, कीर्ति और अपकीर्ति–ऎसे ये प्राणियो के नाना प्रकार के भाव मुझ से ही होते है|
english: The intellect, the GYAN (Supreme Knowledge), understanding, forbearance, truth, control over the mind and senses, joys, sorrows, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, non-violence, even-mindedness, contentment, austerity, charity, fame, infamy, all of these and other diverse elements that surround life in this world, arise and begin from ME, the Supreme Soul.
explanation: The intellect, the GYAN (Supreme Knowledge), understanding, forbearance, truth, control over the mind and senses, joys, sorrows, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, non-violence, even-mindedness, contentment, austerity, charity, fame, infamy, all of these and other diverse elements that surround life in this world, arise and begin from ME, the Supreme Soul.

sanskrit: महर्षयः सप्त पूर्वे चत्वारो मनवस्तथा । मद्भावा मानसा जाता येषां लोक इमाः प्रजाः ॥ १०.६ ॥
hindi: सात महषिजन, चार उनसे भी पूर्व में होने वाले सनकादि स्वयम्भुव आदि चौदह मनु —-ये मुझ में भाव वाले सब-के-सब मेरे संकल्प से उत्पन्न हुए है, जिनकी संसार में यह सम्पुर्ण प्रजा है|
english: The seven great sages (wisemen), their four elders (such as SANAK and the others) and the fourteen MANUS (the forefathers and originators of man-kind, namely SWAYAMBHU MANU and the generation that followed him), who were all my great devotees and were born out of MY will, all the beings that have evolved in the world are descendents of these devotees of mine.
explanation: The seven great sages (wisemen), their four elders (such as SANAK and the others) and the fourteen MANUS (the forefathers and originators of man-kind, namely SWAYAMBHU MANU and the generation that followed him), who were all my great devotees and were born out of MY will, all the beings that have evolved in the world are descendents of these devotees of mine.

sanskrit: एतां विभूतिं योगं च मम यो वेत्ति तत्त्वतः । सोSविकल्पेन योगेन युज्यते नात्र संशयः ॥ १०.७ ॥
hindi: जो पुरुष मेरी इस परमेश्वर्य रूप विभूति को और योग शक्त्ति को तत्व जानता है, वह निश्चल भक्त्ति योग से युक्त्त हो जाता है—इसमे कुछ भी संशय नहीं है|
english: He who fully understands my Supreme Glories and the divine powers of Yoga, will undoubtedly achieve the most Supreme goal of a lifetime, and that is, to become united and enjoined with ME. To achieve this Supreme state one must take part in firm and constant meditation, having only Myself fixed in his mind at all times.
explanation: He who fully understands my Supreme Glories and the divine powers of Yoga, will undoubtedly achieve the most Supreme goal of a lifetime, and that is, to become united and enjoined with ME. To achieve this Supreme state one must take part in firm and constant meditation, having only Myself fixed in his mind at all times.

sanskrit: अहं सर्वस्य प्रभवो मत्तः सर्वं प्रवर्तते । इति मत्वा भजन्ते मां बुधा भावसमन्विताः ॥ १०.८ ॥
hindi: मैं वासुदेव ही सम्पूर्ण जगत्त् की उत्पत्ति का कारण हूँ और मुझ से ही सब जगत्त् चेष्टा करता है, इस प्रकार समझ कर श्रद्भा और भक्त्ति से युक्त्त बुद्भिमान् भक्त्तजन मुझ परमेश्वर को निरन्तर भजते है|
english: Arjuna, recognize Me as the eternal source and MAKER of all that exists in this world. It is because of ME that anything can move in this world. Those who truly know and understand this, are wise people and shall always worship ME with full faith and devotion.
explanation: Arjuna, recognize Me as the eternal source and MAKER of all that exists in this world. It is because of ME that anything can move in this world. Those who truly know and understand this, are wise people and shall always worship ME with full faith and devotion.

sanskrit: मच्चित्ता मद्गतप्राणा बोधयन्तः परस्परम् । कथयन्तश्र्च मां नित्यं तुष्यन्ति च रमन्ति च ॥ १०.९ ॥
hindi: निरन्तर मुझ मे मन लगाने वाले और मुझ में ही प्राणो को अर्पण करने वाले भक्त्त जन मेरी भक्त्ति की चर्चा के द्भारा आपस मे मेरे प्रभाव को जानते हुए तथा गुण और प्रभाव सहित मेरा कथन करते हुए ही निरन्तर संतुष्ट होते हैं और मुझ वासुदेव में ही  निरन्तर रमण करते हैं |
english: Those faithful devotees, of MINE whose mind are constantly fixed on ME, enlightening each other spiritually about ME and are always talking about my divine attributes and virtues, are forever contented and delighted.
explanation: Those faithful devotees, of MINE whose mind are constantly fixed on ME, enlightening each other spiritually about ME and are always talking about my divine attributes and virtues, are forever contented and delighted.

sanskrit: तेषामेवानुकम्पार्थमहमज्ञानजं तमः । नाशयाम्यात्मभावस्थो ज्ञानदीपेन भास्वता ॥ १०.११ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! उनके ऊपर अनुग्रह करने के लिये उनके अन्तः -करण में स्थित हुआ मै स्वयं ही उनके अज्ञान जनित अन्धकार को प्रकाश मय तत्व ज्ञान रूप दीपक के द्बारा नष्ट कर देता हूँ |
english: While dwelling in the hearts of my devotees, I shed MY divine grace upon them and through the light that emanates from the lamp of knowledge (GYAN), I rid them of their darkness that has evolved from their ignorance.
explanation: While dwelling in the hearts of my devotees, I shed MY divine grace upon them and through the light that emanates from the lamp of knowledge (GYAN), I rid them of their darkness that has evolved from their ignorance.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । परं ब्रह्म परं धाम पवित्रं परमं भवान् पुरुषं शाश्र्वतं दिव्यमादिदेवमजं विभुम् ॥ १०....
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—-आप परम ब्रह्रा, परम धाम और परम पवित्र है ; क्योंकि आपको सब ऋषिगण सनातन दिव्य पुरुष एवं देवों का भी आदिदेव, अजन्मा और सर्व व्यापी कहते हैं, वैसे ही देवषि नारद तथा असित और देवल ऋषि तथा महषि व्यास भी कहते हैं और स्वयं आप भी मेरे प्रति कहते है |
english: Arjuna said: Dear Lord, You are the highest, the absolute the Supreme, Eternal and everlasting, the greatest purifier, the ultimate resort, Surpasser of all boundaries known to man, the origin of all Deities, the omni-present Spirit, and filled with spiritual Divinity. The greatest seers and divine sages, NARADA, ASIT, DEVAL, VYAS as well as You yourself have said all of these characteristics of You, my Lord.
explanation: Arjuna said: Dear Lord, You are the highest, the absolute the Supreme, Eternal and everlasting, the greatest purifier, the ultimate resort, Surpasser of all boundaries known to man, the origin of all Deities, the omni-present Spirit, and filled with spiritual Divinity. The greatest seers and divine sages, NARADA, ASIT, DEVAL, VYAS as well as You yourself have said all of these characteristics of You, my Lord.

sanskrit: आहुस्त्वामृषयः सर्वे देवर्षिर्नारदस्तथा । असितो देवलो व्यासः स्वयं चैव ब्रवीषि मे ॥ १०.१३ ॥
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—-आप परम ब्रह्रा, परम धाम और परम पवित्र है ; क्योंकि आपको सब ऋषिगण सनातन दिव्य पुरुष एवं देवों का भी आदिदेव, अजन्मा और सर्व व्यापी कहते हैं, वैसे ही देवषि नारद तथा असित और देवल ऋषि तथा महषि व्यास भी कहते हैं और स्वयं आप भी मेरे प्रति कहते है
english: Arjuna said: Dear Lord, You are the highest, the absolute the Supreme, Eternal and everlasting, the greatest purifier, the ultimate resort, Surpasser of all boundaries known to man, the origin of all Deities, the omni-present Spirit, and filled with spiritual Divinity.The greatest seers and divine sages, NARADA, ASIT, DEVAL, VYAS as well as You yourself have said all of these characteristics of You, my Lord.
explanation: Arjuna said: Dear Lord, You are the highest, the absolute the Supreme, Eternal and everlasting, the greatest purifier, the ultimate resort, Surpasser of all boundaries known to man, the origin of all Deities, the omni-present Spirit, and filled with spiritual Divinity.The greatest seers and divine sages, NARADA, ASIT, DEVAL, VYAS as well as You yourself have said all of these characteristics of You, my Lord.

sanskrit: सर्वमेतदृतं मन्ये यन्मां वदसि केशव । न हि ते भगवन्व्यक्तिं विदुर्देवा न दानवाः ॥ १०.१४ ॥
hindi: हे केशव ! जो कुछ भी मेरे प्रति आप कहते हैं, इस सब को मैं सत्य मानता हूँ । हे भगवन् ! आपके लीलामय, स्वरूप को न तो दानव जानते हैं और न देवता ही|
english: Lord Krishna, I accept all of the Knowledge that You have bestowed upon ME as true. I have also understood, dear Lord, that your very manifestation and origin is not understood by Deities let alone demons.
explanation: Lord Krishna, I accept all of the Knowledge that You have bestowed upon ME as true. I have also understood, dear Lord, that your very manifestation and origin is not understood by Deities let alone demons.

sanskrit: स्वयमेवात्मनात्मानं वेत्थ त्वं पुरुषोत्तम । भूतभावन भूतेश देवदेव जगत्पते ॥ १०.१५ ॥
hindi: हें भूतों को उत्पन्न करने वाले ! हे भूतों के ईश्वर ! हे देवों के देव ! जगत्त् के स्वामी ! हे पुरुषोतम ! आप स्वयं ही अपने से अपने को जानते हैं |
english: Arjuna continued: O Krishna, Originator of all, Lord of all beings, Lord of all Deities, Master and Creator of the World, the FIRST among all men, you alone in this universe, truly know Yourself.
explanation: Arjuna continued: O Krishna, Originator of all, Lord of all beings, Lord of all Deities, Master and Creator of the World, the FIRST among all men, you alone in this universe, truly know Yourself.

sanskrit: वक्तुमर्हस्यशेषेण दिव्या ह्यात्मविभूतयः । याभिर्विभूतिभिर्लोकानिमांस्त्वं व्याप्य तिष्ठसि ॥ १०.१६ ॥
hindi: आपको वास्तव में, बिना किसी रिजर्व के, मुझे अपनी दिव्य महिमा के बारे में बताना चाहिए जिसके द्वारा आप इन सभी दुनियाओं में व्याप्त हैं।
english: You should indeed, without reserve, tell me of Your Divine glories by which You exist pervading all these worlds.
explanation: You should indeed, without reserve, tell me of Your Divine glories by which You exist pervading all these worlds.

sanskrit: कथं विद्यामहं योगिंस्त्वां सदा परिचिन्तयन् । केषु केषु च भावेषु चिन्त्योऽसि भगवन्मया ॥ १०.१७ ॥
hindi: हे योगेश्वर ! मै किस प्रकार निरन्तर चिन्तन करता हुआ आपको जानूं और हे भगवन् ! आप किन-किन भावों में मेरे द्बारा चिन्तन करने योग्य हैं ?
english: Lord Krishna, please, fully describe to me, how I shall truly know you by constantly meditating upon you. In how many different forms can I meditate upon you to completely understand you ?
explanation: Lord Krishna, please, fully describe to me, how I shall truly know you by constantly meditating upon you. In how many different forms can I meditate upon you to completely understand you ?

sanskrit: विस्तरेणात्मनो योगं विभूतिं च जनार्दन । भूयः कथय तृप्तिर्हि शृण्वतो नास्ति मेऽमृतम् ॥ १०.१८ ॥
hindi: हे जनार्दन ! अपनी योग शक्त्ति को और विभूति को फिर भी विस्तार पूर्वक कहिये; क्योकि आपके अमृत मय वचनों को सुनते हुए मेरी तृप्ति नहीं होती अर्थात् सुनने की उत्कण्ठा बनी ही रहती है |
english: Arjuna demanded further: Lord Krishna, once again, describe fully to me, your divine glories and supreme splendour. My thirst for hearing your sweet and divine words again and again, is not yet quenched.
explanation: Arjuna demanded further: Lord Krishna, once again, describe fully to me, your divine glories and supreme splendour. My thirst for hearing your sweet and divine words again and again, is not yet quenched.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । हन्त ते कथयिष्यामि दिव्या ह्यात्मविभूतयः प्राधान्यतः कुरुश्रेष्ठ नास्त्यन्तो विस्त...
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले—हे कुरूश्रेष्ठ ! अब मैं जो मेरी दिव्य विभूतियां हैं, उनको तेरे लिये प्रधानता से कहूँगा; क्योंकि मेरे विस्तार का अन्त नहीं है |
english: The Blessed Lord said: You are blessed O Best of the KURUS; hence I will declare to you my Divine Glory by its chief characteristics; there is no end to details of Me.
explanation: The Blessed Lord said: You are blessed O Best of the KURUS; hence I will declare to you my Divine Glory by its chief characteristics; there is no end to details of Me.

sanskrit: आदित्यानामहं विष्णुर्ज्योतिषां रविरंशुमान् । मरीचिर्मरुतामस्मि नक्षत्राणामहं शशी ॥ १०.२१ ॥
hindi: मै अदिति के बारह पुत्रों में विष्णु और ज्योतियों में किरणों वाला सूर्य हूँ तथा मैं उन्नचास वायु देवताओं का तेज और नक्षत्रों का अधिपति चन्द्रमा हूँ|
english: Among the sons of light I am Vishnu; of radiances, the Glorious Sun. I am the lord of the winds and storms, and of the lights in the night I am the moon.
explanation: Among the sons of light I am Vishnu; of radiances, the Glorious Sun. I am the lord of the winds and storms, and of the lights in the night I am the moon.

sanskrit: वेदानां सामवेदोऽस्मि देवानामस्मि वासवः । इन्द्रियाणां मनश्चास्मि भूतानामस्मि चेतना ॥ १०.२२ ॥
hindi: मै वेदों में सामवेद हूँ, देवों में इन्द्र हूँ, इन्द्रियों में मन हूँ और भूत-प्राणियों की चेतना अर्थात् जीवन शक्त्ति हूँ|
english: Of the Vedas I am the Veda of songs, I am Indra, the Chief of Gods I am the mind amongst the senses, and in all living beings I am the light of consciousness.
explanation: Of the Vedas I am the Veda of songs, I am Indra, the Chief of Gods I am the mind amongst the senses, and in all living beings I am the light of consciousness.

sanskrit: रुद्राणां शंकरश्चास्मि वित्तेशो यक्षरक्षसाम् । वसूनां पावकश्चास्मि मेरुः शिखरिणामहम् ॥ १०.२३ ॥
hindi: और रुद्रों में से मैं शंकर हूं; यक्षों और राक्षसों में से मैं धन का प्रभु (कुबेर) हूँ; वसुस के बीच मैं पावक (अग्नि) हूँ; और पहाड़ों के बीच मैं MERU हूँ.
english: And among the RUDRAS I am Shankara; among the YAKSHAS and RAKSHASAS I am the Lord of wealth (KUBERA) ; among the VASUS I am PAVAKA (AGNI) ; and among the mountains I am the MERU.
explanation: And among the RUDRAS I am Shankara; among the YAKSHAS and RAKSHASAS I am the Lord of wealth (KUBERA) ; among the VASUS I am PAVAKA (AGNI) ; and among the mountains I am the MERU.

sanskrit: पुरोधसां च मुख्यं मां विद्धि पार्थ बृहस्पतिम् । सेनानीनामहं स्कन्दः सरसामस्मि सागरः ॥ १०.२४ ॥
hindi: पुरोहितों में मुखिया बृहस्पति मुझको जान । हे पार्थ ! मैं सेनापतियों में स्कन्द और जलाशयों में समुद्र हूँ|
english: I am the divine priest, Brihaspati among the priest, and among warriers Skanda, the God of war. Of lakes I am the vast ocean.
explanation: I am the divine priest, Brihaspati among the priest, and among warriers Skanda, the God of war. Of lakes I am the vast ocean.

sanskrit: महर्षीणां भृगुरहं गिरामस्म्येकमक्षरम् । यज्ञानां जपयज्ञोऽस्मि स्थावराणां हिमालयः ॥ १०.२५ ॥
hindi: मै महर्षियों में भृगु और शब्दों में एक अक्षर अर्थात् ओंकार हूँ ।  सब प्रकार से यज्ञों में जप यज्ञ और स्थिर रहने वालों में हिमालय पहाड़ हूँ|
english: I am Bhrigu among great seers and of words I am OM, the word of eternity. Of prayers I am the prayer of silence; and of things that move not I am the Himalayas.
explanation: I am Bhrigu among great seers and of words I am OM, the word of eternity. Of prayers I am the prayer of silence; and of things that move not I am the Himalayas.

sanskrit: अश्वत्थः सर्ववृक्षाणां देवर्षीणां च नारदः । गन्धर्वाणां चित्ररथः सिद्धानां कपिलो मुनिः ॥ १०.२६ ॥
hindi: मैं समस्त वृक्षो में पीपल का वृक्ष, देवऋषियो में नारद, गन्धर्वों में चित्ररथ और सिद्धों में कपिल मुनि हूँ |
english: Of trees I am the tree of life, and of heavenly seers, Narada. Among celestial musicians I am Chitra-Ratha, and among seers of earth, Kapila.
explanation: Of trees I am the tree of life, and of heavenly seers, Narada. Among celestial musicians I am Chitra-Ratha, and among seers of earth, Kapila.

sanskrit: उच्चैःश्रवसमश्वानां विद्धि माममृतोद्भवम् । ऐरावतं गजेन्द्राणां नराणां च नराधिपम् ॥ १०.२७ ॥
hindi: घोड़ो में अमृत के साथ उत्पन्न होने वाला उच्चैःश्रवा नामक घोड़ा, श्रेष्ट हाथियों में ऐरावत नामक हाथी और मनुष्यों में राजा मुझको जान|
english: I am the horse of Indra among horses; and of elephants, Indra’s elephant Airavat. Among men I am King of men.
explanation: I am the horse of Indra among horses; and of elephants, Indra’s elephant Airavat. Among men I am King of men.

sanskrit: आयुधानामहं वज्रं धेनूनामस्मि कामधुक् । प्रजनश्चास्मि कन्दर्पः सर्पाणामस्मि वासुकिः ॥ १०.२८ ॥
hindi: मैं शस्त्रों में वज्र और गौओं में कामधेनु हूँ । शास्त्रोक्त्त रीति से संतान की उत्पति का हेतु कामदेव हूँ और सर्पों में सर्पराज वासुकि हूँ|
english: Of weapons I am the thunderbolt, and of cows the cow of wonder. Among creators I am the creator of love, and among serpents the serpent of Eternity.
explanation: Of weapons I am the thunderbolt, and of cows the cow of wonder. Among creators I am the creator of love, and among serpents the serpent of Eternity.

sanskrit: अनन्तश्चास्मि नागानां वरुणो यादसामहम् । पितॄणामर्यमा चास्मि यमः संयमतामहम् ॥ १०.२९ ॥
hindi: मैं नागों में शेषनाग और जलचरों का अधिपति वरुण देवता हूँ और पितरों में अर्यमा नामक पितर तथा शासन करने वालों में यमराज मैं हूँ|
english: Among the snakes of mystery I am Ananta, and of those born in waters I am Varuna, their Lord. Of the spirits of the fathers am Aryaman, and I am Yama, the ruler of death.
explanation: Among the snakes of mystery I am Ananta, and of those born in waters I am Varuna, their Lord. Of the spirits of the fathers am Aryaman, and I am Yama, the ruler of death.

sanskrit: पवनः पवतामस्मि रामः शस्त्रभृतामहम् । झषाणां मकरश्चास्मि स्रोतसामस्मि जाह्नवी ॥ १०.३१ ॥
hindi: मैं पवित्र करने वालों में वायु और शस्त्र धारियों में श्रीराम हूँ तथा मछलियों में मगर हूँ और नदियों में श्रीभागीरथी गंगा जी हूँ |
english: I am the wind among things of purification, and among warriors I am Rama, the hero supreme. Of fishes in the sea I am Makara, the wonderful and among all rivers the holy Ganges.
explanation: I am the wind among things of purification, and among warriors I am Rama, the hero supreme. Of fishes in the sea I am Makara, the wonderful and among all rivers the holy Ganges.

sanskrit: सर्गाणामादिरन्तश्च मध्यं चैवाहमर्जुन । अध्यात्मविद्या विद्यानां वादः प्रवदतामहम् ॥ १०.३२ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन !सृष्टियों का आदि और अन्त तथा मध्य भी मै ही हूँ । मैं विद्याओं में अध्यात्म विद्या अर्थात् ब्रह्मविद्या और परस्पर विवाद करने वालों का तत्व-निर्णय के लिये किया जाने वाला वाद हूँ |
english: I am the beginning and the middle and the end of all that is. Of all knowledge I am the knowledge of the Soul. Of the many paths of reason I am the one that leads to Truth.
explanation: I am the beginning and the middle and the end of all that is. Of all knowledge I am the knowledge of the Soul. Of the many paths of reason I am the one that leads to Truth.

sanskrit: अक्षराणामकारोऽस्मि द्वन्द्वः सामासिकस्य च । अहमेवाक्षयः कालो धाताहं विश्वतोमुखः ॥ १०.३३ ॥
hindi: मैं अक्षरों में अकार हूँ और समासों में द्वन्द्व नामक समास हूँ, अक्षय काल अर्थात् काल का भी महाकाल तथा सब ओर मुख वाला, विराट् स्वरूप सब का धारण-पोषण करने वाला भी मै ही हूँ|
english: Of sounds I am the first sound ‘A’. Of compounds I am coordination. I am time, never ending time. I am the Creator who sees all.
explanation: Of sounds I am the first sound ‘A’. Of compounds I am coordination. I am time, never ending time. I am the Creator who sees all.

sanskrit: मृत्युः सर्वहरश्चाहमुद्भवश्च भविष्यताम् । कीर्तिः श्रीर्वाक्च नारीणां स्मृतिर्मेधा धृतिः क्षमा ॥ १०...
hindi: मैं सबका नाश करने वाला मृत्यु और उत्पन्न होने वालों का उत्पति हेतु हूँ तथा स्त्रियों में कीर्ति,श्री,वाक् स्मृति, मेधा,धृति और क्षमा हूँ |
english: I am death that carries off all things, and I am the source of things to come. Of feminine nouns I am Fame and Prosperity; speech, Memory and Intelligence, Constancy and Forgiveness.
explanation: I am death that carries off all things, and I am the source of things to come. Of feminine nouns I am Fame and Prosperity; speech, Memory and Intelligence, Constancy and Forgiveness.

sanskrit: बृहत्साम तथा साम्नां गायत्री छन्दसामहम् । मासानां मार्गशीर्षोऽहमृतूनां कुसुमाकरः ॥ १०.३५ ॥
hindi: तथा गायन करने योग्य श्रुतियों में मैं बृहत्साम और छन्दों में गायत्री छन्द हूँ तथा महीनों में मार्ग शीर्ष और ऋतुओं में बसन्त मैं हूँ|
english: I am the Brihat song of all songs in the Vedas. I am the Gayatri of all measures in Verse. Of months I am the first of the year, and of all the seasons the season of blossoms.
explanation: I am the Brihat song of all songs in the Vedas. I am the Gayatri of all measures in Verse. Of months I am the first of the year, and of all the seasons the season of blossoms.

sanskrit: द्यूतं छलयतामस्मि तेजस्तेजस्विनामहम् । जयोऽस्मि व्यवसायोऽस्मि सत्त्वं सत्त्ववतामहम् ॥ १०.३६ ॥
hindi: मैं छ्ल करने वालों में जूआ और प्रभावशाली पुरुषो का प्रभाव हूँ । मैं जीतने वालों का विजय हूँ, निश्चय करने वालों का निश्चय और सात्विक पुरुषों का सात्विक भाव हूँ |
english: I am the cleverness in the gambler’s dice. I am the beauty of all things beautiful. I am victory and the struggle for victory. I am the goodness of those who are good.
explanation: I am the cleverness in the gambler’s dice. I am the beauty of all things beautiful. I am victory and the struggle for victory. I am the goodness of those who are good.

sanskrit: वृष्णीनां वासुदेवोऽस्मि पाण्डवानां धनंजयः । मुनीनामप्यहं व्यासः कवीनामुशना कविः ॥ १०.३७ ॥
hindi: वृष्णिवंशियों में वासुदेव अर्थात् मैं स्वयं तेरा सखा पाण्डवों में धनंजय अर्थात् तू, मुनियों में वेद-व्यास और कवियों में शुक्राचार्य  कवि भी मैं ही हूँ |
english: Of all the children of Vrishni I am Krishna; and of the sons of Pandu I am Arjuna, Among seers in silence I am Vyasa; and among poets the poet Usana.
explanation: Of all the children of Vrishni I am Krishna; and of the sons of Pandu I am Arjuna, Among seers in silence I am Vyasa; and among poets the poet Usana.

sanskrit: दण्डो दमयतामस्मि नीतिरस्मि जिगीषताम् । मौनं चैवास्मि गुह्यानां ज्ञानं ज्ञानवतामहम् ॥ १०.३८ ॥
hindi: मैं दमन करने वालों का दण्ड अर्थात् दमन करने की शक्त्ति हूँ, जीतने की इच्छा वालों की नीति हूँ, गुप्त रखने योग्य भावों का रक्षक मौन हूँ और ज्ञानवानों का तत्व ज्ञान मै ही हूँ |
english: I am the sceptre of rulers of men; and I am the wise policy of those who seeks victory. I am the silence of hidden mysteries, and I am the knowledge of those who know.
explanation: I am the sceptre of rulers of men; and I am the wise policy of those who seeks victory. I am the silence of hidden mysteries, and I am the knowledge of those who know.

sanskrit: यच्चापि सर्वभूतानां बीजं तदहमर्जुन । न तदस्ति विना यत्स्यान्मया भूतं चराचरम् ॥ १०.३९ ॥
hindi: और हे अर्जुन ! जो सब भूतों की उत्पत्ति का कारण है, वह भी मै ही हूँ, क्योंकि ऐसा वह चर और अचर कोई भी भूत नहीं है, जो मुझसे रहित हो|
english: Arjuna, know that I am the seed of all things that are, and that no being that moves or moves not can ever be without Me.
explanation: Arjuna, know that I am the seed of all things that are, and that no being that moves or moves not can ever be without Me.

sanskrit: यद्यद्विभूतिमत्सत्त्वं श्रीमदूर्जितमेव वा । तत्तदेवावगच्छ त्वं मम तेजोंऽशसंभवम् ॥ १०.४१ ॥
hindi: जो-जो भी विभूति युक्त्त अर्थात् ऐश्वर्य युक्त्त, कान्ति युक्त्त और शक्त्ति युक्त्त वस्तु है, उस-उसको तू मेरे तेज के अंश की ही अभिव्यक्त्ति जान|
english: Whatever is beautiful and good, whatever has glory and power is only a portion of My own radiance.
explanation: Whatever is beautiful and good, whatever has glory and power is only a portion of My own radiance.

sanskrit: अथवा बहुनैतेन किं ज्ञातेन तवार्जुन । विष्टभ्याहमिदं कृत्स्नमेकांशेन स्थितो जगत् ॥ १०.४२ ॥
hindi: अथवा हे अर्जुन ! इस बहुत जानने से तेरा क्या प्रयोजन है । मैं इस सम्पूर्ण जगत् को अपनी योग शक्त्ति के एक अंश मात्र से धारण करके स्थित हूँ |
english: But of what help is it to you to know this diversity? Know that with one single fraction of My Being I pervade and support the Universe and know that I am.
explanation: But of what help is it to you to know this diversity? Know that with one single fraction of My Being I pervade and support the Universe and know that I am.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । मदनुग्रहाय परमं गुह्यमध्यात्मसंज्ञितम् यत्त्वयोक्तं वचस्तेन मोहोऽयं विगतो मम ॥ ११.१ ...
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—मुझ पर अनुग्रह करने के लिये आपने जो परम गोपनीय अध्यात्म विषयक वचन अर्थात् उपदेश कहा, उससे मेरा यह अज्ञान नष्ट हो गया है |
english: Arjuna thankfully replied: O Lord it is because of Your mercy alone that the mystery of the self which has confused me until now, has become clear in the mind.
explanation: Arjuna thankfully replied: O Lord it is because of Your mercy alone that the mystery of the self which has confused me until now, has become clear in the mind.

sanskrit: भवाप्ययौ हि भूतानां श्रुतौ विस्तरशो मया । त्वत्तः कमलपत्राक्ष माहात्म्यमपि चाव्ययम् ॥ ११.२ ॥
hindi: प्राणियों की उत्पत्ति और विनाश, वास्तव में, मेरे द्वारा आप से विस्तार से सुना गया है, हे कमल की आंखों वाले कृष्ण, और आपकी असीम महानता भी।
english: The origin and destruction of beings verily, have been heard by me in detail from You, O Lotus-eyed Krishna, and also Your inexhaustible greatness.
explanation: The origin and destruction of beings verily, have been heard by me in detail from You, O Lotus-eyed Krishna, and also Your inexhaustible greatness.

sanskrit: एवमेतद्यथात्थ त्वमात्मानं परमेश्वर । द्रष्टुमिच्छामि ते रूपमैश्वरं पुरुषोत्तम ॥ ११.३ ॥
hindi: (अब) हे परम प्रभु! जैसा कि आपने इस प्रकार अपने आप को वर्णित किया है, मैं (वास्तव में) आपके रूप दिव्य, हे पुरुषोत्तम को देखना चाहता हूं।
english: (Now) O Supreme Lord! As you have thus described Yourself, I wish to see (actually) Your Form Divine, O PURUSHOTTAMA.
explanation: (Now) O Supreme Lord! As you have thus described Yourself, I wish to see (actually) Your Form Divine, O PURUSHOTTAMA.

sanskrit: मन्यसे यदि तच्छक्यं मया द्रष्टुमिति प्रभो । योगेश्वर ततो मे त्वं दर्शयात्मानमव्ययम् ॥ ११.४ ॥
hindi: हे प्रभो ! यदि मेरे द्वारा आपका वह रूप देखा जाना शक्य है—ऐसा आप मानते है, तो हे योगेश्वर ! उस अविनाशी स्वरूप का मुझे दर्शन कराइये |
english: O Great Lord of Yoga, if you think of me as being worthy and able to see your Supreme form, then display Your true, eternal self to me dear Lord.
explanation: O Great Lord of Yoga, if you think of me as being worthy and able to see your Supreme form, then display Your true, eternal self to me dear Lord.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । पश्य मे पार्थ रूपाणि शतशोऽथ सहस्रशः नानाविधानि दिव्यानि नानावर्णाकृतीनि च ॥ ११.५ ॥
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले —–हे पार्थ ! अब तू मेरे सैकड़ों-हजारों नाना प्रकार के और नाना वर्ण तथा नाना आकृति वाले अलौकिक रूपों को देख|
english: The Blessed lord said: Behold O Dear Arjuna, as I reveal to you hundreds and even thousands of My various, divine forms of several colours and shapes.
explanation: The Blessed lord said: Behold O Dear Arjuna, as I reveal to you hundreds and even thousands of My various, divine forms of several colours and shapes.

sanskrit: पश्यादित्यान्वसून्रुद्रानश्विनौ मरुतस्तथा । बहून्यदृष्टपूर्वाणि पश्याश्चर्याणि भारत ॥ ११.६ ॥
hindi: हे भरतवंशी अर्जुन ! तू मुझ में आदित्यों को अर्थात् अदितिं के द्बादश पुत्रों को, आठ वसुओं को, एकादश रुद्रों को, दोनों अश्विनी कुमारों को और उन्चास मरुदगणों को देख तथा और भी बहुत से पहले न देखे हुए आश्चर्य मय रूपों को देख|
english: Watch My Dear Devotee, as I disclose to you my various forms. The gods of sun, fire and light; the gods of storm, and lightning and the two beautiful charioteers of Heaven. Behold O Relative of Bharata, vision and sights never before seen by the naked human eyes!
explanation: Watch My Dear Devotee, as I disclose to you my various forms. The gods of sun, fire and light; the gods of storm, and lightning and the two beautiful charioteers of Heaven. Behold O Relative of Bharata, vision and sights never before seen by the naked human eyes!

sanskrit: इहैकस्थं जगत्कृत्स्नं पश्याद्य सचराचरम् । मम देहे गुडाकेश यच्चान्यद् द्रष्टुमिच्छसि ॥ ११.७ ॥
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! अब इस मेरे शरीर में एक जगह स्थित चराचर सहित सम्पूर्ण जगत् को देख तथा और भी जो कुछ देखना चाहते हो सो देख|
english: Arjuna, see before you now, the whole universe as it both moving and at rest, see whatever you desire. See it all in me because I am in everything and everything is in Me.
explanation: Arjuna, see before you now, the whole universe as it both moving and at rest, see whatever you desire. See it all in me because I am in everything and everything is in Me.

sanskrit: न तु मां शक्यसे द्रष्टुमनेनैव स्वचक्षुषा । दिव्यं ददामि ते चक्षुः पश्य मे योगमैश्वरम् ॥ ११.८ ॥
hindi: परन्तु मुझको तू इन अपने प्राकृत नेत्रों द्वारा देखने में निःसंदेह समर्थ नहीं है ; इसी से मैं तुझे दिव्य अर्थात् अलौकिक चक्षु देता हूँ ; इससे तू मेरी ईश्वरीय योग शक्त्ति को देख |
english: However, Dear Arjuna, understand that one can only see My divine form through divine eye-sight. You can never see Me through your mortal eyes. Therefore I will give you divine eye-sight to behold my divine Power and glory.
explanation: However, Dear Arjuna, understand that one can only see My divine form through divine eye-sight. You can never see Me through your mortal eyes. Therefore I will give you divine eye-sight to behold my divine Power and glory.

sanskrit: संजय उवाच । एवमुक्त्वा ततो राजन्महायोगेश्वरो हरिः दर्शयामास पार्थाय परमं रूपमैश्वरम् ॥ ११.९ ॥
hindi: संजय बोले — हे राजन् ! महा योगेश्वर और सब पापों के नाश करने वाले भगवान् ने इस प्रकार कहकर उसके पश्चात् अर्जुन को परम ऐश्वर्य युक्त्त दिव्य स्वरूप दिखलाया|
english: Sanjaya (narrator of the Geeta), further explained to his King: Thus, when the great Lord Hari, God of Yoga  had spoken, He revealed to Partha (Arjuna) His Divine Form.
explanation: Sanjaya (narrator of the Geeta), further explained to his King: Thus, when the great Lord Hari, God of Yoga  had spoken, He revealed to Partha (Arjuna) His Divine Form.

sanskrit: दिव्यमाल्याम्बरधरं दिव्यगन्धानुलेपनम् । सर्वाश्चर्यमयं देवमनन्तं विश्वतोमुखम् ॥ ११.११ ॥
hindi: 1. दिव्य माला (हार) और परिधान पहने हुए, दिव्य unguents के साथ अभिषिक्त, सभी अद्भुत, चमकदार, अंतहीन, सभी पक्षों का सामना करना पड़ रहा है.
english: 1. Wearing divine garlands (necklaces) and apparel, anointed with divine unguents, the All-wonderful, Resplendent, Endless, facing all sides.
explanation: 1. Wearing divine garlands (necklaces) and apparel, anointed with divine unguents, the All-wonderful, Resplendent, Endless, facing all sides.

sanskrit: दिवि सूर्यसहस्रस्य भवेद्युगपदुत्थिता । यदि भाः सदृशी सा स्याद्भासस्तस्य महात्मनः ॥ ११.१२ ॥
hindi: आकाश में हजार सूर्यो के एक साथ उदय होने से उत्पन्न जो प्रकाश हो, वह भी उस विश्व रूप परमात्मा के प्रकाश के सद्र्श कदाचित् ही हो |
english: The divine radiance and beautiful light that was being emmitted by the glorious vision was so great that it could only be matched by the light of one thousand suns arising in the sky at once.
explanation: The divine radiance and beautiful light that was being emmitted by the glorious vision was so great that it could only be matched by the light of one thousand suns arising in the sky at once.

sanskrit: तत्रैकस्थं जगत्कृत्स्नं प्रविभक्तमनेकधा । अपश्यद्देवदेवस्य शरीरे पाण्डवस्तदा ॥ ११.१३ ॥
hindi: पाण्डु पुत्र अर्जुन ने उस समय अनेक प्रकार से विभक्त्त अर्थात् पृथक्-पृथक् सम्पूर्ण जगत् को देवों के देव श्रीकृष्ण भगवान् के उस शरीर में एक जगह स्थित देखा|
english: Here, the Pandava (Arjuna) saw the whole universe in its several dimensions and varieties all gathered together in the Supreme Lord of Lords.
explanation: Here, the Pandava (Arjuna) saw the whole universe in its several dimensions and varieties all gathered together in the Supreme Lord of Lords.

sanskrit: ततः स विस्मयाविष्टो हृष्टरोमा धनंजयः । प्रणम्य शिरसा देवं कृताञ्जलिरभाषत ॥ ११.१४ ॥
hindi: फिर, धनंजय, आश्चर्य से भरा हुआ, अपने बालों के साथ अंत में खड़े थे, भगवान को अपना सिर झुकाया और जुड़ी हुई हथेलियों के साथ बात की।
english: Then, Dhananjaya, filled with wonder, with his hair standing on end, bowed down his head to the God and spoke with joined palms.
explanation: Then, Dhananjaya, filled with wonder, with his hair standing on end, bowed down his head to the God and spoke with joined palms.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । पश्यामि देवांस्तव देव देहे सर्वांस्तथा भूतविशेषसंघान् । ब्रह्माणमीशं कमलासनस्थ- मृ...
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—–हे देव ! मै आपके शरीर में सम्पूर्ण देवों कों तथा अनेक भूतों के समुदायों कों, कमल के आसन पर विराजित ब्रह्मा को, महादेव को और सम्पूर्ण ऋषियों को तथा दिव्य सर्पो को देखता हूँ
english: O Lord, I have seen within Thy heavenly body, all of the gods and the infinite variety of being that have been created by You. I see before Me the great Lord Brahma who is seated on the lotus throne, all the seers of light (sages), and the Divine Serpents as well.
explanation: O Lord, I have seen within Thy heavenly body, all of the gods and the infinite variety of being that have been created by You. I see before Me the great Lord Brahma who is seated on the lotus throne, all the seers of light (sages), and the Divine Serpents as well.

sanskrit: अनेकबाहूदरवक्त्रनेत्रं पश्यामि त्वां सर्वतोऽनन्तरूपम् । नान्तं न मध्यं न पुनस्तवादिं पश्यामि विश्...
hindi: हे सम्पूर्ण विश्व के स्वामिन् ! आपको अनेक भुजा, पेट, मुख, और नेत्रों से युक्त्त तथा सब ओर से अनन्त रूपों वाला देखता हूँ । हे विश्व रूप ! मैं आपके न अन्त को देखता हूँ न मध्य को, और न आदि को ही |
english: Arjuna explained to the Lord:                                                                                                                         O Krishna, I behold your image as being never-ending, with countless arms, faces, bellies, eyes, and mouth. I sense the divinity and power coming from all parts of Your Superior Being. O Lord of Lords, I am unable to see Thy beginning, middle or end for You are of infinite form!
explanation: Arjuna explained to the Lord:                                                                                                                         O Krishna, I behold your image as being never-ending, with countless arms, faces, bellies, eyes, and mouth. I sense the divinity and power coming from all parts of Your Superior Being. O Lord of Lords, I am unable to see Thy beginning, middle or end for You are of infinite form!

sanskrit: किरीटिनं गदिनं चक्रिणं च तेजोराशिं सर्वतो दीप्तिमन्तम् । पश्यामि त्वां दुर्निरीक्ष्यं समन्ता- द्द...
hindi: आप को मैं मुकुट युक्त्त, गदा युक्त्त और चक्र युक्त्त तथा सब ओर से प्रकाशमान तेज के पुञ्ज, प्रज्वलित अग्नि और सूर्य के सद्र्श ज्योति युक्त्त, कठिनता से देखे जाने योग्य और सब ओर से अप्रमेय स्वरूप देखता हूँ|
english: I can clearly see the crown, sceptre and discus glowing upon Your lotus body like a mass of intense light. Your dazzling image is difficult for me to behold and believe, yet I still see You in Your full brilliance as the eternal, flaming fire, the blinding sun and truly as one of a kind.
explanation: I can clearly see the crown, sceptre and discus glowing upon Your lotus body like a mass of intense light. Your dazzling image is difficult for me to behold and believe, yet I still see You in Your full brilliance as the eternal, flaming fire, the blinding sun and truly as one of a kind.

sanskrit: त्वमक्षरं परमं वेदितव्यं त्वमस्य विश्वस्य परं निधानम् । त्वमव्ययः शाश्वतधर्मगोप्ता सनातनस्त्वं पु...
hindi: आप ही जानने योग्य परम अक्षर अर्थात् परब्रह्म परमात्मा हैं, आप ही इस जगत् के परम आश्रय हैं, आप ही अनादि धर्म के रक्षक है और आप ही अविनाशी सनातन पुरुष हैं । ऐसा मेरा मत हैं|
english: You are immortal, imperishable and never ending. You are the height of knowledge and the Supreme to be realized by all. You are the support of this large universe. I think you to be the guardian and ruler of the eternal law of purity and virtue. You are the ever-lasting Spirit who is, and always has been, at the very beginning of all things in the universe.
explanation: You are immortal, imperishable and never ending. You are the height of knowledge and the Supreme to be realized by all. You are the support of this large universe. I think you to be the guardian and ruler of the eternal law of purity and virtue. You are the ever-lasting Spirit who is, and always has been, at the very beginning of all things in the universe.

sanskrit: अनादिमध्यान्तमनन्तवीर्य- मनन्तबाहुं शशिसूर्यनेत्रम् । पश्यामि त्वां दीप्तहुताशवक्त्रं स्वतेजसा वि...
hindi: आपको आदि, अन्त, और मध्य से रहित, अनन्त सामर्थ्य से युक्त्त, अनन्त भुजा वाले, चन्द्र-सूर्य रूप नेत्रों वाले, प्रज्वलित अग्नि रूप मुख वाले और अपने तेज से इस जगत् को संतप्त करते हुए देखता हूँ |
english: O Great Lord, I see Thee as having no beginning, middle or end; being of endless and infinite power and glory which is all contained in Your unlimited number of divine arms. Thy face resembles an eternal fire that gives light and life to all things in this enormous universe. In Thine eyes I see the sun and the moon, dear Lord.
explanation: O Great Lord, I see Thee as having no beginning, middle or end; being of endless and infinite power and glory which is all contained in Your unlimited number of divine arms. Thy face resembles an eternal fire that gives light and life to all things in this enormous universe. In Thine eyes I see the sun and the moon, dear Lord.

sanskrit: अमी हि त्वां सुरसंघा विशन्ति केचिद्भीताः प्राञ्जलयो गृणन्ति । स्वस्तीत्युक्त्वा महर्षिसिद्धसंघाः ...
hindi: वे ही देवताओं के समूह आप में प्रवेश करते है और कुछ भयभीत होकर हाथ जोड़े आपके नाम और गुणों का उच्चारण करते है तथा महर्षि और सिद्धो के समुदाय ‘कल्याण हो’ ऐसा कहकर उत्तम-उत्तम स्तोत्रों द्वारा आपकी स्तुति करते हैं |
english: The many hosts of gods join and come into You my Lord. Out of respect, fear and love for You, they praise and adore You. The great sages and seers all sing praises of Thy glory as well, Almighty Lord.
explanation: The many hosts of gods join and come into You my Lord. Out of respect, fear and love for You, they praise and adore You. The great sages and seers all sing praises of Thy glory as well, Almighty Lord.

sanskrit: रुद्रादित्या वसवो ये च साध्या विश्वेऽश्विनौ मरुतश्चोष्मपाश्च । गन्धर्वयक्षासुरसिद्धसंघा वीक्षन्ते...
hindi: जो ग्यारह रूद्र और बारह आदित्य तथा आठ वसु, साध्य गण, विश्वेदेव अश्विनी कुमार तथा मरुदगण और पितरों का समुदाय तथा गन्धर्व, यक्ष, राक्षस और सिद्धों के समुदाय है —-वे सब ही विस्मित होकर आपको देखते है |
english: The Rudras of destruction, the Adityas, the Vasus, the Sadhyas, and the Visvedevas; the two Asvins (Charioteers) of heaven; the Maruts (Lord of winds and storms); the Spirits of Ancestors; the divine singing choirs of the Gandharvas; the Yakshas (keepers of wealth); the demons of hell; and the Siddhas (those who gained the prestigious goal of perfection on earth), all of these Supreme souls and saints gaze upon Thee with wonder and respect.
explanation: The Rudras of destruction, the Adityas, the Vasus, the Sadhyas, and the Visvedevas; the two Asvins (Charioteers) of heaven; the Maruts (Lord of winds and storms); the Spirits of Ancestors; the divine singing choirs of the Gandharvas; the Yakshas (keepers of wealth); the demons of hell; and the Siddhas (those who gained the prestigious goal of perfection on earth), all of these Supreme souls and saints gaze upon Thee with wonder and respect.

sanskrit: रूपं महत्ते बहुवक्त्रनेत्रं महाबाहो बहुबाहूरुपादम् । बहूदरं बहुदंष्ट्राकरालं दृष्ट्वा लोकाः प्रव्...
hindi: हे महाबाहो ! आपके बहुत मुख और नेत्रों वाले, बहुत हाथ, जड़ा और पैरो वाले, बहुत उदरों वाले और बहुत सी दाढ़ों के कारण अत्यन्त विकराल महान् रुपको देखकर सब लोग व्याकुल हो रहे हैं तथा मैं भी व्याकुल हो रहा हूँ |
english: However Dear Lord, the worlds cannot help but tremble at the fearful sight of Your mighty and terrifying forms. The forms consisting of many eyes, mouth, bellies, feet and terrible fangs that are too frightening for the average mortal to gaze upon. However this is but one single aspect of your omniscience (being everything and every-where) in the universe.
explanation: However Dear Lord, the worlds cannot help but tremble at the fearful sight of Your mighty and terrifying forms. The forms consisting of many eyes, mouth, bellies, feet and terrible fangs that are too frightening for the average mortal to gaze upon. However this is but one single aspect of your omniscience (being everything and every-where) in the universe.

sanskrit: नभःस्पृशं दीप्तमनेकवर्णं व्यात्ताननं दीप्तविशालनेत्रम् । दृष्ट्वा हि त्वां प्रव्यथितान्तरात्मा धृ...
hindi: क्योंकि हे विष्णो ! आकाश को स्पर्श करने वाले, देदीप्यमान, अनेक वर्णों से युक्त्त तथा फैलाये हुए मुख और प्रकाश मान विशाल नेत्रों से युक्त्त आपको देखकर भयभीत अन्त:करण वाला मैं धीरज ओर शान्ति नहीं पाता हूँ|
english: O Lord, when I see Your vast and enormous form which reaches the sky, surrounded by a burning and magnificient glow of several beautiful colours, with mouth opened wide and large, my heart and inmost soul tremble in amazement and terror. My power and peace of mind have also vanished, Dear Vishnu.
explanation: O Lord, when I see Your vast and enormous form which reaches the sky, surrounded by a burning and magnificient glow of several beautiful colours, with mouth opened wide and large, my heart and inmost soul tremble in amazement and terror. My power and peace of mind have also vanished, Dear Vishnu.

sanskrit: दंष्ट्राकरालानि च ते मुखानि दृष्ट्वैव कालानलसन्निभानि । दिशो न जाने न लभे च शर्म प्रसीद देवेश जगन...
hindi: दाढ़ों के कारण विकराल और प्रलय काल की अग्नि के समान आपके मुखों कों देख कर मैं दिशाओं को नहीं जानता हूँ और सुख भी नहीं पाता हूँ । इसलिये हे देवेश ! हे जगन्निवास ! आप प्रसन्न हों |
english: O Lord, seeing Your enormous facial features and frightening teeth like the fire that burns till the end of time and all existence, I find myself truly losing all sense of direction and peace with myself! O Lord have mercy on me! Give me shelter, O Giver of refuge and Supreme Being of this vast universe.
explanation: O Lord, seeing Your enormous facial features and frightening teeth like the fire that burns till the end of time and all existence, I find myself truly losing all sense of direction and peace with myself! O Lord have mercy on me! Give me shelter, O Giver of refuge and Supreme Being of this vast universe.

sanskrit: अमी च त्वां धृतराष्ट्रस्य पुत्राः सर्वे सहैवावनिपालसंघैः । भीष्मो द्रोणः सूतपुत्रस्तथासौ सहास्मदी...
hindi: वे सभी धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्र राजाओं के समुदाय सहित आप में प्रवेश कर रहे हैं और भीष्म पितामह, द्रोणाचार्य तथा वह कर्ण और हमारे पक्ष के भी प्रधान योद्धाओं के सहित सब-के-सब आपके दाढ़ों के कारण विकराल भयानक मुखों से बड़े वेग से दोड़ते हुए प्रवेश कर रहे हैं और कई एक चूर्ण और सिरों सहित आपके दाँतों के बीच लगे हुए दीख रहे हैं|
english: Arjuna began to explain: All the sons of Dhratarashtra together with the other hosts of kings and princes along with Bhisma, Drona, and Karna and other great warriors on our side….Arjuna Continued:…are all being forced to enter the various mouths of your most enormous and terrifying forms, inspiring terror in everyone with those fearful fangs.
explanation: Arjuna began to explain: All the sons of Dhratarashtra together with the other hosts of kings and princes along with Bhisma, Drona, and Karna and other great warriors on our side….Arjuna Continued:…are all being forced to enter the various mouths of your most enormous and terrifying forms, inspiring terror in everyone with those fearful fangs.

sanskrit: वक्त्राणि ते त्वरमाणा विशन्ति दंष्ट्राकरालानि भयानकानि । केचिद्विलग्ना दशनान्तरेषु संदृश्यन्ते चू...
hindi: वे सभी धृतराष्ट्र के पुत्र राजाओं के समुदाय सहित आप में प्रवेश कर रहे हैं और भीष्म पितामह, द्रोणाचार्य तथा वह कर्ण और हमारे पक्ष के भी प्रधान योद्धाओं के सहित सब-के-सब आपके दाढ़ों के कारण विकराल भयानक मुखों से बड़े वेग से दोड़ते हुए प्रवेश कर रहे हैं और कई एक चूर्ण और सिरों सहित आपके दाँतों के बीच लगे हुए दीख रहे हैं|
english: Arjuna began to explain: All the sons of Dhratarashtra together with the other hosts of kings and princes along with Bhisma, Drona, and Karna and other great warriors on our side….Arjuna Continued:…are all being forced to enter the various mouths of your most enormous and terrifying forms, inspiring terror in everyone with those fearful fangs.
explanation: Arjuna began to explain: All the sons of Dhratarashtra together with the other hosts of kings and princes along with Bhisma, Drona, and Karna and other great warriors on our side….Arjuna Continued:…are all being forced to enter the various mouths of your most enormous and terrifying forms, inspiring terror in everyone with those fearful fangs.

sanskrit: यथा नदीनां बहवोऽम्बुवेगाः समुद्रमेवाभिमुखा द्रवन्ति । तथा तवामी नरलोकवीरा विशन्ति वक्त्राण्यभिविज...
hindi: जैसे नदियों के बहुत से जल के प्रवाह स्वाभाविक ही समुद्र के ही सम्मुख दौड़ते हैं अर्थात् समुद्र में प्रवेश करते हैं, वैसे ही वे नरलोक के वीर भी आपके प्रज्वलित मुखों में प्रवेश कर रहे हैं|
english: Your flaming mouths are consuming all of these heroes of our modern world like roaring torrents of rivers rushing forward into the ocean.
explanation: Your flaming mouths are consuming all of these heroes of our modern world like roaring torrents of rivers rushing forward into the ocean.

sanskrit: यथा प्रदीप्तं ज्वलनं पतङ्गा विशन्ति नाशाय समृद्धवेगाः । तथैव नाशाय विशन्ति लोका- स्तवापि वक्त्राण...
hindi: जैसे पतंग मोह वश नष्ट होने के लिये प्रज्वलित अग्नि में अतिवेग से दौड़ते हुए प्रवेश करते हैं, वैसे ही ये सब लोग भी अपने नाश के लिये आपके मुखों में अतिवेग से दौड़ते हुए प्रवेश कर रहे हैं|
english: All of these men are rushing swiftly into the blazing fire coming from Your several mouths, towards their death and destruction just as moths swiftly rush into a burning flame and die.
explanation: All of these men are rushing swiftly into the blazing fire coming from Your several mouths, towards their death and destruction just as moths swiftly rush into a burning flame and die.

sanskrit: आख्याहि मे को भवानुग्ररूपो नमोऽस्तु ते देववर प्रसीद । विज्ञातुमिच्छामि भवन्तमाद्यं न हि प्रजानामि...
hindi: मुझे बतलाइये कि आप उग्र रूप वाले कौन हैं ? हे देवों में श्रेष्ट ! आपको नमस्कार हो । आप प्रसन्न होईये । आदि पुरुष आपको मैं विशेष रूप से जानना चाहता हूँ ; क्योंकि मैं आपकी प्रवृति को नहीं जानता|
english: Dear Lord Supreme, I do not understand Your mysterious ways. Reveal Yourself to me! Who are You in this terrible form? Be gracious to me Dear Lord, and explain to me the secret of Your reality, for I am confused.
explanation: Dear Lord Supreme, I do not understand Your mysterious ways. Reveal Yourself to me! Who are You in this terrible form? Be gracious to me Dear Lord, and explain to me the secret of Your reality, for I am confused.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । कालोऽस्मि लोकक्षयकृत्प्रवृद्धो लोकान्समाहर्तुमिह प्रवृत्तः । ऋतेऽपि त्वां न भविष्...
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले— मैं लोकों का नाश करने वाला बढ़ा हुआ महाकाल हूँ । इस समय इन लोकों को नष्ट करने के लिये प्रवृत हुआ हूँ । इसलिये  जो प्रतिपक्षियों की सेना में स्थित योद्धा लोग हैं, वे सब तेरे बिना भी नहीं रहेंगे अर्थात् तेरे युद्ध न करने पर भी इन सबका नाश हो जायगा |
english: The Blessed Lord spoke: Dear Arjuna, understand that I am the all-powerful entity known as Time, which destroys all beings in this universe. Even without the help of your actions, all of these warriors standing before Me in the opposing armies shall cease to live!
explanation: The Blessed Lord spoke: Dear Arjuna, understand that I am the all-powerful entity known as Time, which destroys all beings in this universe. Even without the help of your actions, all of these warriors standing before Me in the opposing armies shall cease to live!

sanskrit: तस्मात्त्वमुत्तिष्ठ यशो लभस्व जित्वा शत्रून् भुङ्क्ष्व राज्यं समृद्धम् । मयैवैते निहताः पूर्वमेव ...
hindi: अतएव तू उठ ! यश प्राप्त कर और शत्रुओं को जीत कर धन-धान्य सम्पन्न राज्य को भोग । ये सब शूर वीर पहले ही से मेरे द्वारा मारे हुए हैं  । हे सव्यसाचिन् ! तू तो केवल निमित्त मात्र बन जा|
english: Therefore, arise O son of Kunti (Arjuna), win thy glory, conquer your enemies, enjoy a prosperous kingdom! Through the result of their own Karma, I have doomed these people to die and you, My Dear disciple, are simply a means of Mine by which this task shall be accomplished.
explanation: Therefore, arise O son of Kunti (Arjuna), win thy glory, conquer your enemies, enjoy a prosperous kingdom! Through the result of their own Karma, I have doomed these people to die and you, My Dear disciple, are simply a means of Mine by which this task shall be accomplished.

sanskrit: द्रोणं च भीष्मं च जयद्रथं च कर्णं तथान्यानपि योधवीरान् । मया हतांस्त्वं जहि मा व्यथिष्ठा युध्यस्व...
hindi: द्रोणाचार्य और भीष्म पितामह तथा जयद्रथ और कर्ण तथा और भी बहुत से मेरे द्वारा मारे हुए शूर वीर, योद्धाओं को तू मार । भय मत कर । नि:संदेह तू युद्ध में बैरियों को जीतेगा । इसलिये युद्ध कर|
english: Do not fear O Arjuna! Fight and slay all these great warriors such as Drona, Bhisma, Karna and Jayad-Ratha, who are already doomed for death! Be bold O Arjuna! perform your duty; conquer your enemies in battle and leave the rest up to Me the Supreme Lord.
explanation: Do not fear O Arjuna! Fight and slay all these great warriors such as Drona, Bhisma, Karna and Jayad-Ratha, who are already doomed for death! Be bold O Arjuna! perform your duty; conquer your enemies in battle and leave the rest up to Me the Supreme Lord.

sanskrit: संजय उवाच । एतच्छ्रुत्वा वचनं केशवस्य कृताञ्जलिर्वेपमानः किरीटी । नमस्कृत्वा भूय एवाह कृष्णं सगद...
hindi: संजय बोले —– केशव भगवान् के इस वचन को सुन कर मुकुट धारी अर्जुन हाथ जोड़ कर काँपता हुआ नमस्कार करके, फिर भी अत्यन्त भयभीत होकर प्रणाम करके भगवान् श्रीकृष्ण के प्रति गदगद वाणी से बोले|
english: Sanjaya narrated to his King: When Arjuna had heard the words of Krishna, he folded his hands and bowed his trembling body down before the Great Lord in adoration and in a faultering voice he spoken:
explanation: Sanjaya narrated to his King: When Arjuna had heard the words of Krishna, he folded his hands and bowed his trembling body down before the Great Lord in adoration and in a faultering voice he spoken:

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । स्थाने हृषीकेश तव प्रकीर्त्या जगत्प्रहृष्यत्यनुरज्यते च । रक्षांसि भीतानि दिशो द्रव...
hindi: अर्जुन बोले—-हे अन्तर्यामिन् ! यह योग्य ही है की आपके नाम, गुण और प्रभाव के कीर्तन से जगत् अति हर्षित हो रहा है और अनुराग को भी प्राप्त हो रहा है तथा भयभीत राक्षस लोग दिशाओं में भाग रहे है और सब सिद्ध गुणों के समुदाय नमस्कार कर रहे हैं|
english: Dear Krishna, it is a true fact that countless people sing thy praise and take delight in glorifying You. The Rakshasas (evil-doers) flee in terror in all directions from Your Divine Might! All the great Saint and Seers bow down in love and adoration before You.
explanation: Dear Krishna, it is a true fact that countless people sing thy praise and take delight in glorifying You. The Rakshasas (evil-doers) flee in terror in all directions from Your Divine Might! All the great Saint and Seers bow down in love and adoration before You.

sanskrit: कस्माच्च ते न नमेरन्महात्मन् गरीयसे ब्रह्मणोऽप्यादिकर्त्रे । अनन्त देवेश जगन्निवास त्वमक्षरं सदसत...
hindi: हे महात्मन् ! ब्रह्मा के भी आदिकर्ता और सबसे बड़े आप के लिये वे कैसे नमस्कार न करें ; क्योकि हे अनन्त ! हे देवेश ! हे जगन्निवास ! जो सत्, असत् और उनसे परे अक्षर अर्थात् सच्चिदानन्धन ब्रह्मा है वह आप ही हैं|
english: To think that any wiseman would do anything else but bow down before Your infinite greatness. is unwise, O Blessed Lord, Lord of Lords, Spirit Supreme! You are the Lord of Brahma (the Lord of Creation). You, my Dear Lord, are the never-ending, eternal refuge of the world. You are all that exists, that is non-existent, and that is even beyond existence.
explanation: To think that any wiseman would do anything else but bow down before Your infinite greatness. is unwise, O Blessed Lord, Lord of Lords, Spirit Supreme! You are the Lord of Brahma (the Lord of Creation). You, my Dear Lord, are the never-ending, eternal refuge of the world. You are all that exists, that is non-existent, and that is even beyond existence.

sanskrit: त्वमादिदेवः पुरुषः पुराण- स्त्वमस्य विश्वस्य परं निधानम् । वेत्तासि वेद्यं च परं च धाम त्वया ततं ...
hindi: आप आदि देव और सनातन पुरुष हैं, आप इस जगत् के परम आश्रय और जानने वाले तथा जानने योग्य और परम धाम हैं । हे अनन्त रूप ! आप से यह सब जगत् व्याप्त अर्थात् परिपूर्ण हैं|
english: You are the first and foremost of Gods; You are the beginning of all existence and are the support of this vast universe. You know all and You are all that is to be known. You are the sole Supreme Goal to be realized by all. You are the Eternal and Omnipresent. From You alone all things have evolved O Krishna!
explanation: You are the first and foremost of Gods; You are the beginning of all existence and are the support of this vast universe. You know all and You are all that is to be known. You are the sole Supreme Goal to be realized by all. You are the Eternal and Omnipresent. From You alone all things have evolved O Krishna!

sanskrit: वायुर्यमोऽग्निर्वरुणः शशाङ्कः प्रजापतिस्त्वं प्रपितामहश्च । नमो नमस्तेऽस्तु सहस्रकृत्वः पुनश्च भू...
hindi: आप वायु, यमराज ; अग्नि, वरुण, चन्द्रमा, प्रजा के स्वामी ब्रह्मा और ब्रह्मा के भी पिता हैं । आपके लिये हजारों बार नमस्कार ! नमस्कार हो !! आपके लिये फिर भी बार-बार नमस्कार ! नमस्कार !!|
english: You are the wind (Vayu); Yama (the destroyer); You are the Sea-God (Varuna); the moon (Lord Sasanka); the Grand King of all (Prajapati). Hail to Thee O Lord! A thousand adorations to thee! Again and again to thee everyone hails!
explanation: You are the wind (Vayu); Yama (the destroyer); You are the Sea-God (Varuna); the moon (Lord Sasanka); the Grand King of all (Prajapati). Hail to Thee O Lord! A thousand adorations to thee! Again and again to thee everyone hails!

sanskrit: सखेति मत्वा प्रसभं यदुक्तं हे कृष्ण हे यादव हे सखेति । अजानता महिमानं तवेदं मया प्रमादात्प्रणयेन ...
hindi: आपके इस प्रभाव को न जानते हुए, आप मेरे सखा हैं ऐसा मानकर प्रेम से अथवा प्रमाद से भी मैने ‘हे कृष्ण !,’ हे यादव !,’ हे सखे !’ इस प्रकार जो कुछ बिना सोचे समझे ह्ठात् कहा हैं और हे अच्युत ! जो मेरे द्वारा विनोद के लिये विहार, शय्या, आसन, और भोजनादि में अकेले अथवा उन सखाओं के सामने भी अपमानित किये गये हैं —– वह सब अपराध अप्रमेय स्वरूप अर्थात् अचिन्तय प्रभाव वाले आप से मैं क्षमा करवाता हूँ |
english:
O Madhava (Krishna). my dear comrade and Lord, for whatever I have unthinkingly said to You, ignorant of the fact  that You are very much more a Greater Being than simply MY companion in battle; for my utter ignorance or maybe out of fondness…
…for whatsoever I have incorrectly presumed about You; for my irreverence and disrespect when alone with You or amongst companions; for making fun or teasing You at play or at rest: for all these things, dear Lord, please find it in Your divine heart to forgive Me for this ignorance.
explanation:
O Madhava (Krishna). my dear comrade and Lord, for whatever I have unthinkingly said to You, ignorant of the fact  that You are very much more a Greater Being than simply MY companion in battle; for my utter ignorance or maybe out of fondness…
…for whatsoever I have incorrectly presumed about You; for my irreverence and disrespect when alone with You or amongst companions; for making fun or teasing You at play or at rest: for all these things, dear Lord, please find it in Your divine heart to forgive Me for this ignorance.

sanskrit: यच्चावहासार्थमसत्कृतोऽसि विहारशय्यासनभोजनेषु । एकोऽथवाप्यच्युत तत्समक्षं तत्क्षामये त्वामहमप्रमेय...
hindi: जिस भी तरह से मैंने मज़े के लिए आपका अपमान किया हो सकता है, जबकि खेल में, प्रस्तुत करने या बैठने, या भोजन पर, जब अकेले (आपके साथ), हे अच्युता, या कंपनी में - कि, हे अथाह एक, मैं आपको क्षमा करने के लिए विनती करता हूं।
english: In whatever way I may have insulted You for the sake of fun, while at play, reposing or sitting, or at meals, when alone (with You), O Achyuta, or in company — that, O Immeasurable One, I implore You to forgive.
explanation: In whatever way I may have insulted You for the sake of fun, while at play, reposing or sitting, or at meals, when alone (with You), O Achyuta, or in company — that, O Immeasurable One, I implore You to forgive.

sanskrit: पितासि लोकस्य चराचरस्य त्वमस्य पूज्यश्च गुरुर्गरीयान् । न त्वत्समोऽस्त्यभ्यधिकः कुतोऽन्यो लोकत्रय...
hindi: आप इस चराचर जगत् के पिता और सबसे बड़े गुरु एवं अति पूजनीय हैं, हे अनुपम प्रभाव वाले ! तीनों लोकों में आपके समान भी दूसरा कोई नहीं है फिर अधिक तो कैसे हो सकता हैं ।
english: Arjuna continued to praise Krishna: You are the divine father of All. The Supreme Master. You are all that is moving and unmoving. You are the single object of worship in all the universe and the Supreme Teacher. Who is like You? Whose power exceeds and goes beyond Your infinite Might?
explanation: Arjuna continued to praise Krishna: You are the divine father of All. The Supreme Master. You are all that is moving and unmoving. You are the single object of worship in all the universe and the Supreme Teacher. Who is like You? Whose power exceeds and goes beyond Your infinite Might?

sanskrit: तस्मात्प्रणम्य प्रणिधाय कायं प्रसादये त्वामहमीशमीड्यम् । पितेव पुत्रस्य सखेव सख्युः प्रियः प्रिया...
hindi: अतएव हे प्रभो ! मैं शरीर को भली भांति चरणों में निवेदित कर प्रणाम करके स्तुति करने योग्य आप ईश्वर को प्रसन्न होने के लिये प्रार्थना करता हूँ, हे देव ! पिता जैसे पुत्र के, सखा जैसे सखा के और पति जैसे प्रियतमा पत्त्नी के अपराध सहन करते हैं —- वैसे ही आप भी मेरे अपराध को सहन करने योग्य हैं |
english: I kneel before Your greatness O Lord, simply in love and adoration for You! I beg for beg your good grace and mercy on me, O Vishnu. I plead with Thee Shri Krishna, as a friend to his friend or as a lover would to his beloved!
explanation: I kneel before Your greatness O Lord, simply in love and adoration for You! I beg for beg your good grace and mercy on me, O Vishnu. I plead with Thee Shri Krishna, as a friend to his friend or as a lover would to his beloved!

sanskrit: अदृष्टपूर्वं हृषितोऽस्मि दृष्ट्वा भयेन च प्रव्यथितं मनो मे । तदेव मे दर्शय देव रूपं प्रसीद देवेश ...
hindi: मैं पहले न देखे हुए आपके इस आश्चर्य मय रूप को देख कर हर्षित हो रहा हूँ और मेरा मन भय से अति व्याकुल भी हो रहा हैं ; इसलिये आप उस अपने चतुर्भुज विष्णु रूप को ही मुझे दिखलाइये ! हे देवेश ! हे जगन्निवास ! प्रसन्न होइये ।
english:
Arjuna expressed gratefully:
The vision that I have seen because of your divine Grace, no mortal man has seen before, At the same time, I rejoice with extreme joy and my heart trembles with fear of You, O Lord! Have mercy on Me, O Lord of all the Lords, Be gracious O Refuge of this universe! Please show me your human form once more.
explanation:
Arjuna expressed gratefully:
The vision that I have seen because of your divine Grace, no mortal man has seen before, At the same time, I rejoice with extreme joy and my heart trembles with fear of You, O Lord! Have mercy on Me, O Lord of all the Lords, Be gracious O Refuge of this universe! Please show me your human form once more.

sanskrit: किरीटिनं गदिनं चक्रहस्त- मिच्छामि त्वां द्रष्टुमहं तथैव । तेनैव रूपेण चतुर्भुजेन सहस्रबाहो भव विश...
hindi: मैं तुम्हें पहले की तरह देखना चाहता हूँ, मुकुट पहनाया, एक गदा असर, हाथ में एक डिस्कस के साथ, केवल अपने पूर्व रूप में, चार हथियारों, हे हजार सशस्त्र, हे सार्वभौमिक रूप से होने.
english: I desire to see You as before, crowned, bearing a mace, with a discus in hand, in Your Former Form only, having four arms, O Thousand-armed, O Universal Form.
explanation: I desire to see You as before, crowned, bearing a mace, with a discus in hand, in Your Former Form only, having four arms, O Thousand-armed, O Universal Form.

sanskrit: श्रीभगवानुवाच । मया प्रसन्नेन तवार्जुनेदं रूपं परं दर्शितमात्मयोगात् । तेजोमयं विश्वमनन्तमाद्यं ...
hindi: श्रीभगवान् बोले ——-हे अर्जुन ! अनुग्रह पूर्वक मैंने अपनी योग शक्त्ति के प्रभाव से यह मेरा परम तेजोमय, सबका आदि और सीमा रहित विराट् रूप तुझको दिखलाया है, जिसे तेरे अतिरिक्त दूसरे किसी ने पहले नहीं देखा था|
english: The Lotus-colured Lord Krishna said: Through My divine Power and Grace, Dearest Arjuna, I have shown you the form Supreme made of a divine glow, which is the infinite, endless and true form of mine from beginning of all existence. I have revealed to you O devotee of Mine, the luminous vision of Me which no mortal has observed before.
explanation: The Lotus-colured Lord Krishna said: Through My divine Power and Grace, Dearest Arjuna, I have shown you the form Supreme made of a divine glow, which is the infinite, endless and true form of mine from beginning of all existence. I have revealed to you O devotee of Mine, the luminous vision of Me which no mortal has observed before.

sanskrit: न वेदयज्ञाध्ययनैर्न दानै- र्न च क्रियाभिर्न तपोभिरुग्रैः । एवंरूपः शक्य अहं नृलोके द्रष्टुं त्वदन...
hindi: हे अर्जुन ! मनुष्य लोक में इस प्रकार विश्व रूप वाला मैं न वेद और यज्ञों के अध्ययन से, न दान से, न क्रियाओं से और न उग्र तपों से ही तेरे अतिरिक्त दूसरे के द्वारा देखा जा सकता हूँ ।
english: The Blessed Lord spoke solemnly: O Arjuna, you the greatest of Kurus alone has seen My true and Supreme form. Consider yourself fortunate for neither through the Vedas, nor through sacrifices, nor studies, nor through ceremonial rites, rituals or fearful actions of worship can a mere mortal man hope to see My Supreme form.
explanation: The Blessed Lord spoke solemnly: O Arjuna, you the greatest of Kurus alone has seen My true and Supreme form. Consider yourself fortunate for neither through the Vedas, nor through sacrifices, nor studies, nor through ceremonial rites, rituals or fearful actions of worship can a mere mortal man hope to see My Supreme form.

sanskrit: मा ते व्यथा मा च विमूढभावो दृष्ट्वा रूपं घोरमीदृङ्ममेदम् । व्यपेतभीः प्रीतमनाः पुनस्त्वं तदेव मे ...
hindi: डरो मत, और न ही इस तरह के रूप में मेरे एक भयानक रूप को देखकर चकित हो जाओ; अपने डर के साथ और खुश दिल के साथ, अब फिर से मेरे इस रूप को देखो।
english: Be not afraid, nor bewildered on seeing such a terrible-Form of Mine as this; with your fear dispelled and with gladdened heart, now behold again this Form of Mine.
explanation: Be not afraid, nor bewildered on seeing such a terrible-Form of Mine as this; with your fear dispelled and with gladdened heart, now behold again this Form of Mine.

sanskrit: अर्जुन उवाच । दृष्ट्वेदं मानुषं रूपं तव सौम्यं जनार्दन इदानीमस्मि संवृत्तः सचेताः प्रकृतिं गतः ॥ १...
hindi: अर्जुन बोले —–हे जनार्दन ! आपके इस अति शान्त मनुष्य रूप को देखकर अब मैं स्थिर चित्त हो गया हूँ और अपनी स्वाभाविक स्थिति को प्राप्त हो गया हूँ ।
